title: N8N Systems Operator (Part-Time)
description:
We are looking for an N8N Systems Operator who has real experience setting up, launching, and maintaining a self hosted N8N environment. This role requires confidence with VPS hosting, installation, updates, integrations, and workflow troubleshooting. You will be responsible for managing system performance, automations, and backend connections across our tech stack.



You will also assist with automation tasks inside Go High Level, Apollo, Instantly, Calendly, Notion, and ClickUp. You can work your normal schedule, however some overlap for occasional USA based meetings is helpful.



Key Responsibilities

• Set up and launch a self hosted N8N instance on a VPS

• Configure domains, SSL, environment variables, and security settings

• Maintain updates, version control, and system reliability

• Build and troubleshoot automation workflows inside N8N

• Connect platforms using APIs, webhooks, and integration logic

• Assist with Go High Level workflows and automation settings

• Support Apollo, Instantly, and Calendly connections

• Monitor automations for errors and resolve issues quickly

• Document processes and maintain clear technical notes



Qualifications

• Proven experience launching or managing a self hosted N8N setup

• Experience working with VPS platforms such as DigitalOcean, Linode, Vultr, or similar

• Familiar with Docker or container based deployments

• Strong understanding of APIs, JSON, and webhook integrations

• Experience with Go High Level automation tools

• Familiar with Apollo, Instantly, and Calendly

• Reliable problem solving skills and attention to detail

• Clear written and spoken English

• Able to join occasional meetings with USA based tea
mbers



Preferred Skills



• Experience improving or rebuilding automation workflows

• Experience using Notion and ClickUp

• Familiarity with AI tools that support workflow creation



Compensation

Pay is negotiable based on experience.



Application Process

To apply for this role, candidates MUST complete all of the following steps:

 1. Submit a resume outlining your relevant experience.

 2. Provide links, screenshots, or examples of automation or self hosted work you have completed.

 3. Submit a newly recorded video stating the current date and explaining your experience with N8N and self hosted systems.



Applications must be submitted through this link: 
/4130RpL

title: AI Video Creative Assistant for Fashion E-commerce
description:
We are looking for an AI Video Creative Assistant to help create high-converting video ads for our fashion stores.



Your main role will be to turn product images into AI videos using tools such as Veo 3, Kling AI, and similar platforms. You will also be given competitor AI videos to replicate or adapt into new creatives for our own products and stores.



This is a hands-on creative role for someone who already understands both AI video tools and the e-commerce / dropshipping world.



What you’ll do



Create AI video ads from product images

Use tools like Veo 3, Kling AI, and other AI creative platforms

Replicate or adapt winning competitor-style videos

Edit and polish videos in CapCut when needed

Follow creative directions, hooks, angles, and ad concepts

Deliver multiple variations of creatives for testing

Keep the videos natural, realistic, and made for conversion



What we’re looking for



Strong experience with AI video generation tools

Good understanding of Veo 3, Kling AI, and similar tools

Comfortable using CapCut for editing and finishing touches

Experience working with e-commerce or dropshipping brands

Good eye for what makes a video ad look native and convert

Able to follow references and recreate styles accurately

Fast, reliable, and detail-oriented



Big plus if you have



Worked on fashion creatives

Experience making ads for Meta / TikTok

Understanding of direct response ad creatives

Ability to improve competitor concepts instead of only copying them

Experience with image prompting, motion prompting, and realistic AI outputs



How to apply

Please send:



Examples of AI videos you created

The tools you used for each project

Any experience with fashion, e-commerce, or dropshipping brands

A short explanation of how you would take a product image and turn it into a converting video ad

Your rate and availability



We are looking for someone who can become a strong part of our creative workflow long term.

title: Social Media Growth Manager (Content + Community + Meta Ads + Reporting)
description:
Job Title



Social Media Growth Manager (Content + Community + Meta Ads + Reporting)



Overview



We’re hiring a reliable Social Media Growth Manager to run day-to-day social execution across a small portfolio of UK brands:

 • Medica Universal (GP-led healthcare + weight loss) - Medica.Universal (IG)

 • Rosetta Property Company (UK property investment + HMOs + short-term rentals) - RosettaProperties (IG)

 • Dr Perminder (personal brand content: health, business, and leadership)

 • Moonstar Media (creative/content brand supporting video, storytelling, and production)



This is an execution role with clear SLAs. You will work in ClickUp, follow workflows, publish consistently, and report weekly. You will also repurpose SEO blogs into newsletters and social assets.



Hours (UK time)



10 hours/week to start, with fixed daily cover windows required.

Hours are expected to increase over the next 2–3 months if performance is strong.



Pay



Base: $4/hr

Performance add-ons available (based on outputs, reliability, KPIs, and growth metrics)



Non-Negotiables

 • ClickUp is the source of truth (no WhatsApp-only working)

 • Weekly output targets and reporting are mandatory

 • Clear communication and reliability are essential



Core Responsibilities

 1. Content execution + scheduling



 • Build and maintain a weekly content plan

 • Schedule and publish posts across Instagram,
, and LinkedIn (and other platforms as assigned)

 • Keep a clean content calendar with deadlines and approvals



 2. Community management + engagement



 • Respond to comments and DMs within agreed response windows

 • Use templates/SOPs to follow up leads and move them to booking/enquiry steps



 3. Meta Ads support (important)



 • Set up and manage basic Meta campaigns (lead form + traffic + retargeting) OR support and coordinate ads delivery if you are not fully advanced

 • Track spend, leads, CPL, and outcomes

 • Report performance weekly with clear next steps



 4. Repurposing workflow (important)



 • Convert approved SEO blogs into:

 • newsletters 
 format)

 • carousels (6–10 slides)

 • short captions and posts

 • Follow our templates and workflow (brief ? draft ? approval ? schedule ? report)



 5. Weekly reporting



 • Submit a weekly report every Friday (what shipped + metrics + what’s next)



SLAs (must agree)

 • ClickUp updates: every assigned task must have “Next step + ETA” (no reactions-only updates)

 • Response time: acknowledge messages within 24 hours on working days (within cover windows faster)

 • Weekly deliverables:

 • content plan posted in ClickUp by Monday 12pm UK

 • minimum 5-10 posts scheduled/published per week (platform split agreed)

 • engagement log updated

 • weekly report by Friday 5pm UK



Tools you must use

 • ClickUp (task management)

 • Google Drive (assets/SOPs)

 • Meta Business Suite

Bonus: Canva, Mailchimp/Klaviyo (or similar), basic analytics



Application Instructions (important)



Start your application with the word: Workflow



Include:

 1. Confirmation you accept $4/hr base + performance add-ons

 2. Your fixed weekly availability in UK time (must include daily cover windows)

 3. Two examples of accounts/content you managed (links)

 4. Meta Ads experience: Yes/No. If yes, include results (spend, leads, CPL, ROAS if applicable)



Answer these 3 questions:

A) How would you turn an SEO blog into (1) a newsletter and (2) a 6-slide carousel?

B) What does your weekly report include (exact headings)?

C) Confirm you will work in ClickUp and follow SLAs (Yes/No)



Applications without “Workflow” will not be considered.

title: Amazon Ecommerce Director Operations Manager and PPC
description:
We are a fast-growing U.S.-based eCommerce brand looking for a dedicated, full-time Amazon & eCommerce Operations Manager / Director to work directly with the Founder and lead the entire operations team.



This is a long-term, exclusive position for serious applicants with proven leadership skills who want to grow with a stable company and take pride in their work.

Applicants managing other clients or side projects will not be considered.



The right candidate will manage day-to-day operations across multiple platforms — Amazon, Walmart, eBay, Shopify, TikTok Shop,
/Instagram Shops, and Google Merchant Center.

You’ll oversee product launches, logistics, PPC, inventory, team coordination, and process development while maintaining the highest standards of professionalism, accuracy, and communication.





Responsibilities

• Manage Amazon Seller Central operations (FBA shipments, listings, performance issues, returns, etc.).

• Oversee accounts on Walmart, eBay, TikTok Shop, and Shopify for consistency, optimization, and compliance.

• Coordinate freelancers and specialists (designers, developers, SMM managers, PPC managers, SEO/catalog specialists, VAs, and customer support).

• Assist in recruiting, onboarding, and supervising remote tea
mbers.

• Create and maintain SOPs, ClickUp task systems, and structured project workflows.

• Plan and execute product launches, pricing strategies, and marketing promotions.

• Collaborate with the graphics team to produce Amazon Posts, A+/A++ content, sponsored videos, and seasonal creatives.

• Oversee logistics, labeling, and supplier coordination for shipping and compliance.

• Monitor and optimize PPC campaigns; analyze ACOS, ROAS, and keyword performance.

• Ensure professional, transparent communication — report issues immediately and propose solutions.

• Submit daily EOD reports, weekly KPI summaries, and maintain internal dashboards.

• Maintain strict confidentiality of all brand data, credentials, and strategies.







Requirements

• Minimum 4 years of hands-on Amazon Seller Central management and 2 years of social-media management (organic + paid) experience.

• Experience managing Walmart, eBay, TikTok Shop, and Shopify stores.

• Strong leadership and project-management skills.

• Excellent written and spoken English.

• Experience with Google Ads or Meta/TikTok marketing is a plus.

• Proficient with Helium10, ClickUp, TimeDoctor, Google Drive, and WhatsApp.

• Highly organized, proactive, and results-driven.

• Able to follow chain of command and seek approval for high-impact decisions.

• Honest, dependable, and calm under pressure.

• Willing to work extended hours when deadlines or launches require it.

• Must sign an NDA and complete a trial onboarding period.







Performance Expectations

• This role is measured by results — not hours worked.

• You must demonstrate ownership, accountability, and initiative.

• Failure to communicate delays or mistakes is considered non-performance.

• Performance will be reviewed at 30, 60, and 90 days, then periodically.

• Consistent, proactive communication and reporting are mandatory.

• Maintain active communication on WhatsApp and respond within 10 minutes during working hours.







Tools You’ll Use



Amazon Seller Central

Helium10 / DataHawk / SmartScout / Keepa

ClickUp (Project Management)

Google Drive / Sheets / Docs

TimeDoctor (Time Tracking)

WhatsApp & Slack 



Please attach your Resume,
 and WhatsApp number

title: Amazon A+ Premium Content Graphic Designer, Web Designer
description:
We are looking for a talented and creative Graphic Designer to join our team. The ideal candidate will create visually compelling designs that effectively communicate our brand’s message across digital and print platforms. You should have a strong eye for detail, solid creative skills, and the ability to turn concepts into engaging visuals.



Key Responsibilities



- Design high-quality Amazon product images including hero images, infographics, lifestyle photos, and comparison charts.

- Create Amazon A+ Content and Storefront graphics aligned with brand guidelines.

- Ensure designs comply with Amazon image requirements (dimensions, white background, clarity, etc.).

- Collaborate with the marketing, content, and product development teams to understand product features and selling points.

- Edit and retouch raw product photos for better visual appeal.

- Develop packaging, labels, and other branding materials when needed.

- Maintain an organized workflow and deliver outputs within deadlines.

- Conduct research on competitor listings to help improve design strategy.

- Stay updated with Amazon trends, shopper behavior, and best practices for product listing optimization.

- Having your own repository for stock images is a plus.

- Be responsive to urgent messages and communication during work hours.

- Work efficiently—fast, high-quality output is rewarded.



Requirements



- Proven experience as a Graphic Designer, preferably with Amazon or e-commerce experience.

- Strong portfolio showcasing Amazon product images or similar design work.

- Proficiency in Adobe Photoshop, Illustrator, InDesign, and Canva.

- Basic knowledge of product photography or photo editing is a plus.

- Excellent attention to detail, creativity, and understanding of visual hierarchy.

- Ability to work efficiently, follow instructions accurately, and adapt to revisions.

- Strong time-management and organizational skills.

- Availability for 30–40 hours per week.



Salary & Compensation



Monthly Salary: PHP 40,000

Performance-Based Bonuses:

-->Bonus for number of images or design outputs created

-->Speed and turnaround time bonuses

-->Quality-of-work and performance bonuses

-->Bonus for accuracy, creativity, and strong understanding of instructions and brand guidelines



Additional Note

We’re serious about hiring. This is a real job opening.

title: HR and Operations Manager (Amazon and eCommerce Focus)
description:

title: 3D CAD Designer
description:
The goal of the Sensory Room Design (SRD) team is to successfully close large sales that involve sensory rooms. They focus on designing a room specific to the client’s needs with great attention to detail. 



The 3D CAD Designer creates 3D models of interior spaces from images and floor plans as well as building sensory  equipment sold by the company to be put into the room model. Models will need to be in true-to-life color and rendered in high resolution.



Responsibilities and Process: 

1. Create accurate 3D models of interior spaces from images and floor plans using Rhino3D

2. Understanding floor plans/blueprints and noticing if there are any inaccuracies.

3. Building sensory equipment sold by the company to be put into the room model using Rhino 3D

4. Render Room models using Keyshot and providing good quality final images

5. Meet deadlines

6. Make corrections and changes as needed

7. Be flexible and accept critique willingly

8. Pay attention to detail

9. Accept projects from other departments such as graphics or product development.



Qualifications/ Required Skills: 



1. Excellent organizational skills and attention to detail

2. Ability to follow instructions and communicate effectively

3. Ability to work under pressure to meet tight deadlines

4. Ability to create 3D CAD designs to scale



How to apply:



1. Please complete the following assessment task and submit the finished design:



Please create a 3D CAD rendering of the following two products:

- SensaSoft™ Squeezie Seat 

- SensaSoft™ Play Barrel 



These products should be placed in a bare room with white walls and 1 window.



2. In addition to the assessment, please submit examples of your previous 3D modelling work completed in SketchUp.

title: Web Developer, Blog Writer, & SEO Position For Personal Injury Law Firm
description:
We are seeking a dependable skilled web developer with a strong background in SEO to enhance our website's performance and visibility. 





* MUST BE DEPENDABLE AND SHOW UP TO ALL SCHEDULED INTERVIEWS & MEETINGS

The ideal candidate will be dependable and will show up on time to scheduled interview and meetings. 



The ideal candidate will be responsible for building responsive web pages and implementing SEO best practices to improve search engine rankings. Candidates should be familiar with HTML, CSS, JavaScript, and SEO tools. If you have a passion for creating user-friendly websites and optimizing them for search engines, we would love to hear from you.



Website Developer: WordPress, Page Creation & Blogging, SEO, Google Optimization & Website Performance Enhancement



Job Description:



Seeking a skilled web developer with expertise in WordPress, blogging, SEO, and Google tools optimization. This role focuses on optimizing website performance, enhancing search engine visibility, and improving user experience. Ideal candidates should have experience with technical SEO, Google Analytics GA4 integration, Google My Business management, and content creation.



Responsibilities:



Website Optimization:

Enhance website structure, navigation, and responsiveness on WordPress.

Improve font sizes, graphics, and visuals for better readability and engagement.

Build and optimize webpages for all firm practice areas.



Mobile Performance:

Optimize for mobile performance and ensure compliance with Google Core Web Vitals.

Implement strategies to improve mobile rankings and user experience.



SEO and Keyword Strategy:

Optimize the site for commercial and transactional keywords to rank in the top 20 search engine results.

Build high-quality backlinks and enhance technical SEO.

Strengthen content with clear calls to action (CTAs) to increase engagement.



Google Tools Integration:

Improve website indexing and visibility using Google Search Console.

Install and configure Google Analytics GA4, including tracking codes, data streams, and reporting.

Analyze GA4 data to provide actionable insights for performance improvement.



Google My Business (GMB) Management:

Optimize and manage the firm’s Google My Business profile to increase local search visibility.

Ensure accuracy, use GMB features effectively, and maintain regular updates.



Content and Blogging:

Create SEO-optimized blog posts to drive organic traffic and increase domain authority.

Implement keyword strategies and align content with the firm’s goals.



Requirements:



Proven experience in WordPress development, SEO, and technical website optimization.

Expertise in Google tools, including Analytics (GA4), Search Console, and Google My Business.

Strong knowledge of blogging, content marketing, and backlink building.

Familiarity with Core Web Vitals, mobile-first optimization, and local SEO strategies.

Strong communication skills, detail-oriented, and results-driven approach.



MUST HAVE GOOD INTERNET CONNECTION



Minimum internet connection requirements include 150 Mbps Wifi which is good for activities such as streaming videos and video conferencing, downloading media files, and working remotely. 



Test internet speed here:



https://www.speedtest.net/

title: Legal Assistant / Paralegal / Claims Manager (ONLY APPLY IF YOU HAVE PERSONAL INJURY LAW EXPERIENCE)
description:

To apply to this position you must submit a sample of your legal writing (you can redact any confidential information).  



**MUST HAVE DEDICATED WORKSPACE WITH DESKTOP COMPUTER (WORK FROM TABLET OR MOBILE DEVICE NOT COMPATIBLE WITH OUR SYSTEM DASHBOARDS) & HIGH SPEED INTERNET CONNECTION



***MUST BE AVAILABLE 2:00 PM PST - 6:00 PM PST (UTC-08:00 ) MONDAY-FRIDAY AND 9:00 AM PST - 10:00 AM PST EVERY MONDAY (Tuesday-Saturday in Philippines)



**** MUST BE DEPENDABLE AND SHOW UP TO ALL SCHEDULED INTERVIEWS & MEETINGS



The ideal candidate will be dependable and will show up on time to all scheduled interviews and meetings. 



PERSONAL INJURY EXPERIENCE

Must have experience working in a Plaintiff's Personal Injury Law Firm. 



(Prior to applying for this position, please familiarize yourself with our law firm by reviewing our websites at 
 and all social media profiles for The Sterling Firm). 



The ideal candidate will be dependable and will show up on time to all scheduled interviews and meetings. 



LEGAL ASSISTANT / PARALEGAL / CLAIMS MANAGER / DEMAND WRITER / MEDICAL RECORDS & DOCUMENT RETRIEVAL 



Must have experience in managing personal injury claims from intake to resolution, including but not limited to lead sign up, claim processing, evidence gathering, medical records retrieval, demand drafting, discovery propounding, discovery responses, calendaring, coordinating with adjusters and opposing counsel, pleading drafting, motion drafting, and trial preparation. 



Must know how to evaluate liability and damages in a personal injury insurance claim and also be informed in insurance coverage issues. 

   

Experience in law firm operation systems, including: Clio Manage, Clio Grow, Dialpad, Google Workspace, Google Drive, Google Docs, Zoom, Time Doctor, HelloSign, Docusign. 



Must have good customer service skills and fluent English communications skills. 



The legal assistant / paralegal / claims manager / demand writer / medical records & document retrieval personnel will perform duties such as researching, document drafting and analysis, interviewing clients and witnesses, fact gathering and retrieving information, preparing discovery, and collecting, compiling, and utilizing technical information to make an independent decision and recommendation to the supervising attorney(s).

title: Creative Strategist
description:
We Don't Need a Creative Strategist. We Need a Revenue-Generating Idea Machine.

Most creative strategists make pretty ads. You'll engineer the concepts that scale to millions in profitable revenue.



About Rescale Media

We're not just another e-commerce company. We're a brand incubator on a mission to build enduring, value-driven brands that bring meaningful products into families' lives.

We've scaled from just drop shipping to a 30+ person team doing $1M+/month. Our goal? Multi 9-figures. And we're just getting started. Learn more at 
dia



Our Core Values

- GENIUSES & OWNERS We partner with builders who think like founders. Not employees waiting to be told what to do—owners who see a problem and fix it.

- ITERATIONS > HOURS We don't measure success by time at your desk. We measure it by how fast you can test, learn, and improve. Ship it. Learn. Repeat.

- TRUTH OVER EGO We prioritize honesty and clarity, even when it's uncomfortable. No politics. No BS. Just data and results.



The Role

This is the role that moves the needle more than any other. Our Creative Strategists don't just come up with ideas—they architect the concepts, angles, and hooks that turn cold audiences into raving customers.

You'll work at the intersection of psychology, data, and creativity. Every concept you develop will be tested, measured, and either scaled or killed based on real performance data.

Our brands serve faith-led families and parents who want magic in their children's lives. You'll create advertising that resonates deeply with these audiences—not cheap manipulation, but genuine connection.



We require at least 3-5 concepts per week and are open to working with freelancers.



What You'll Do:

- Develop creative concepts, angles, and hooks that drive profitable customer acquisition

- Write ad scripts, headlines, and copy that convert

- Analyze performance data to understand what's working and why

- Brief video editors and designers on creative execution

- Manage the creative testing pipeline—always have winners in the queue

- Stay on top of creative trends, competitor ads, and market dynamics

- Collaborate with Media Buyers to understand what's scaling and what's not

- Build and maintain our creative knowledge base (what works for our brands)



What We're Looking For

- 3+ years of creative strategy experience in DTC/e-commerce

- Portfolio of ads you've created that scaled to significant spend

- Deep understanding of direct response principles

- Strong copywriting skills—you can write a hook that stops the scroll

- Data literacy—you can read a dashboard and extract insights

- Experience briefing creative teams (video editors, designers)

- Understanding of Meta's ad ecosystem and creative best practices



Bonus Points:

- Experience with faith-based or family-oriented brands

- Background in UGC strategy and influencer creative

- You've built creative processes from scratch

- Performance marketing or media buying experience

- Strong understanding of consumer psychology



This Role Is NOT For...

We're being direct because we respect your time:

- Creatives who care more about awards than results

- Those who can't take feedback on their "babies"

- Anyone who thinks strategy and execution are separate jobs

- People who aren't comfortable with rapid iteration and testing



Compensation & Benefits

- Monthly Salary: $2,000 - $3,000/month

Plus:

- Monthly performance bonuses tied to company Operating Profit (5-25% of salary)

- Quarterly profit pool distribution (2-7.5% of company profits shared among team)

- Ad Bounty Program: Earn 2-7% commission on ad spend for high-performing creatives (ROAS 2.1+)

- Remote-first environment (European timezone preferred)

- Work with a team of A-players who actually give a damn

- Direct founder access—no layers of bureaucracy

- Real ownership of your domain—we don't micromanage



Our Hiring Process

We don't waste time—yours or ours. Here's how it works:

Step 1: Application (You're here!)

Step 2: Initial Interview with Founder

Step 3: Internal Assessment by Rescale

Step 4: WhatsApp update for next steps

Step 5: Signing of Independent Contractor and NDA

Step 6: Onboarding and Training



Total timeline: 1 week from application to offer.



Ready to Apply?

[  
  ]

Complete the application form above. Be thorough—this is your first impression.



P.S. Our best-performing ad ever was a simple concept that took 20 minutes to write. It's generated over $1M in revenue. If you understand why simplicity often wins, we should talk.

P.P.S. If you're reading this far, you're already more thorough than 90% of applicants. That's exactly who we want.

Total timeline: 1 week from application to offer.

Ready to Apply?

title: Illustrator – Cute Character-Based Toy Brand (Female)

We need a talented illustrator who can bring these characters to life across products, packaging, and digital content — someone who genuinely enjoys drawing cute things and can keep a consistent style while staying versatile.



What You'll Be Doing

- Illustrating characters (front, side, back views, expressions, poses)

- Creating variations and adaptations of existing characters for new product lines

- Producing social media graphics — Instagram posts, stories, carousels, short promotional visuals

- Illustrating packaging artwork, hang tags, stickers, and print-ready assets

- Adapting characters into different themes and seasonal editions (holiday, limited drops, collabs)

- Occasionally creating simple animations or GIFs for social content (a plus, not required)

- Working with the team to maintain a cohesive brand style guide



Who We're Looking For

- Strong portfolio showing cute / kawaii / character illustration work

- Comfortable drawing in a consistent style while adapting to different moods and contexts

- Proficient in Adobe Illustrator and Photoshop (Procreate is a bonus)

- Can produce clean vector art suitable for manufacturing and print

- Understands social media visual trends — knows what performs well on Instagram, TikTok, etc.

- Reliable, communicative, and comfortable working remotely with a team across time zones

- Can handle multiple projects and meet deadlines without constant supervision

- Bonus: experience with toy/product design, pattern design, or packaging layout



To Apply - Please send:

We're building something fun and we want someone who's excited to grow with us.

title: Virtual Assistant / Video Editor (Strong English Required – Basic Clean Editing)
description:
You must include your portfolio or an example of your editing capabilities to get accepted for this job.



Also, you must read the whole job post as we will be checking for this in the applications.



We're looking for a long-term tea
mber who has very strong, natural English and can handle basic but clean, professional video edits.



Also someone who can take over tasks that require a deep understanding of what works well on youtube, such as making youtube video scripts that actual hook the viewer in and feel natural, putting together clips to make videos, video idea research, and potentially even making thumbnails if qualified.



We're not expecting advanced animation or super high-level editing, although that would be a plus, and we would pay a different rate for that.



However for this role, what matters most is:

1. Your English comprehension

2. Knowing how to keep a viewer engaged with simple edits, and at least able to edit like this: (link removed)

3. Being able to understand more complex topics like options trading and ecommerce

4. Attention to detail, and ability to make videos feel clean, smooth, and natural by cutting out mistakes, and unnecessary parts



About Us:



We are a YouTube content management agency that works with finance-focused creators (topics like options trading, eCommerce, etc.). We help creators produce, edit, and scale their content.



We’re a small, tight-knit team, and I work closely 1-on-1 with everyone.



What You’ll Be Doing:



1. Editing talking-head style and screenshare YouTube videos

2. Using tools like Descript for auto-cutting and whatever video editor software you normally use

3. Watching through full videos and:

  3a. Cutting out mistakes, pauses, and mess-ups

  3b. Keeping what sounds natural and flows well

  3c. Making edits feel clean, simple, and professional

4. Assisting with:

  4a. YouTube script creation (using ChatGPT)

  4b. Basic content structuring for videos

  4c. Occasionally helping with presentations for videos

5. If there are no projects, you will be asked to take clips of old videos to and rearrange them to make a new video (this will be explained during training). Essentially, the content we can make is unlimited so you can get as much work as you want with this method of recycling and making new content.



What we're Looking For:



Very strong English almost like a native (one of the most important things)

You must be able to tell what sounds natural vs. awkward in videos so you know what to cut out and what to keep in



Basic video editing skills:



You don’t need advanced effects or animations

But you must have a good sense of clean editing and pacing



Ability to understand (or quickly learn) topics like:

Options trading

eCommerce

Fast learner who can pick up systems and workflows quickly

Good communication habits:

Respond quickly

Ask questions

Stay in touch consistently



On your application to this post, make the first line "I read the entire job post" so that I know you read the job post fully.



Work Style & Expectations



Willing to work closely with me 1-on-1

Open to training and learning my workflows

Available most days of the week

At first, not constant work every day, but you should be available when projects come in

If you prove you're capable of the job work will become consistent

Able to meet deadlines consistently



Growth Opportunity



This is not just a basic VA role.



If you do well:



Pay will increase as you take on more complex tasks

You can grow into:

Managing multiple clients

Overseeing other editors

Taking on higher-level responsibilities in the agency



If you’re someone who:



Understands content deeply

Can make clean edits

Communicates well

And wants to grow long-term



Then this is a great opportunity.

description:
We’re hiring a Warm Lead Caller / Appointment Setter to handle leads who have already shown interest.



These aren’t cold calls.

These are people who opted in, booked, or are ready to book — and your job is to move fast, qualify properly, and make sure they show up.



This role is about speed, consistency, and follow-through.



If you’re reliable, responsive, and good on the phone, you’ll do well here.



What You’ll Be Doing:

Call new leads as soon as they come in

Qualify leads and book them into the calendar if not already booked

Confirm appointments and ensure clarity before the call

Call leads again ~1 hour before their scheduled appointment to increase show-up rates

Track all activity and notes inside the CRM

Maintain consistent availability during US time zones + weekends



What You’ll Get:

Base pay + commission structure

Warm, high-intent leads — no random cold lists

Scripts, CRM, and process fully provided

A clear, repeatable system no guesswork



You’re a Good Fit If You:

Speak fluent, confident English

Have experience in appointment setting, warm calling, or sales (preferred)

Are responsive and can act quickly when leads come in

Are comfortable working US hours and weekends

Are organized and consistent with follow-ups

Understand that speed = results in this role



How to Apply:

Send a short Loom (1–2 minutes) answering:



Your experience with calling or appointment setting

Your availability for US hours + weekends

How quickly you typically respond to new leads



We’re hiring one caller/setter for this role.

If you’re fast, reliable, and know how to handle warm leads properly — apply now.



- Pranav

Acquisition Ascension

title: Customer Support & Back-End Manager – Ecommerce
description:
About the Role

We run a growing ecommerce business selling health and wellness products on a subscription model. We're looking for a reliable, organized person to own the full customer experience — from answering questions to solving complex issues and making sure everything runs smoothly behind the scenes.

This is a long-term role with real responsibility. You won't just be copying and pasting scripts — you'll be the person clients count on.

Responsibilities



Answer customer inquiries via
 (fast, professional, friendly)

Process refunds, cancellations, and subscription changes in Shopify

Manage tickets and follow-ups in Reamaze

Coordinate with our fulfillment and warehouse team on orders, delays, and replacements

Handle complex or escalated cases with good judgment and empathy

Keep records clean and flag recurring issues to the team



Requirements



Minimum 2 years in a customer support or customer success role for an ecommerce brand

Hands-on experience with Shopify (not just browsing — actually managing orders, refunds, subscriptions)

Experience with a helpdesk tool like Reamaze, Gorgias, or Zendesk

Able to manage high ticket volume without dropping the ball

Excellent written English — clear, professional, and human

Works independently, makes good judgment calls, and doesn't need daily supervision

Night shifts (PHT)



This is NOT the right role if:



You're just getting started in ecommerce support

You need SOPs written for every scenario

You're looking for a slow-paced, low-volume job



What We Offer



We pay competitive rates for the right person — if you're A1, we'll make it worth your while

100% remote virtual role

Ongoing long-term engagement

Direct communication with the owner — no layers, no bureaucracy

Biweekly pay via Wise



To apply:

title: Lead Generation & Marketing Assistant — Remote | Long-Term
description:
Lead Generation & Marketing Assistant — Remote | Long-Term | Satou Agency



Location: Remote (Worldwide)

Schedule: Full-time

Salary: Competitive, based on experience + performance-based raises

Type: Long-term, stable position



About Us

Satou Agency is a fast-growing international PR & Digital Marketing agency helping exceptional professionals get noticed, trusted, and recognized worldwide. We work with clients across the USA, Europe, Asia, Africa, and CIS markets — specializing in strategic visibility, media placements, industry awards, and high-profile recognition opportunities.

We're a small, close-knit remote team — and we take hiring seriously. We're not looking for someone to fill a seat. We're looking for a person who is technically sharp, communicates with confidence, and wants to grow with us over the long term.



What This Role Is

This is a research, operations, and client communication role at the core of our business. You will build and maintain lead lists, manage CRM systems, support outreach campaigns, create materials, and communicate directly with international clients.

This role requires someone who can think analytically, handle structured data with precision, navigate multiple digital tools confidently, and write professional business English without hesitation. If you're organized, tech-savvy, and thrive in a clear system-driven environment — this role will suit you well.



What You'll Do Day-to-Day

Lead Generation & Outreach



Find and qualify leads on LinkedIn (advanced search) and other platforms

Research companies, decision-makers, and contact details

Build, structure, and maintain accurate contact databases



CRM &
 Automation



Manage and update CRM systems — primarily HubSpot and 

Create and maintain sales funnels and automation workflows

Build and execute targeted
 outreach campaigns, manage mailing lists



Data & Spreadsheet Management



Work with Google Sheets and Excel at a confident level — formulas, pivot tables, data structuring and cleanup

Keep all records organized, accurate, and up to date



Client Communication



Correspond with international clients via
 and messaging — professionally, clearly, and on time

Coordinate tasks and follow up internally to ensure nothing falls through the cracks



Presentations & Materials



Create polished presentations in Canva and PowerPoint for client pitches and internal use

Design basic marketing materials in Canva



AI & Tools



Use ChatGPT and other AI tools to streamline research, outreach, and daily workflows

Adapt quickly to new platforms and troubleshoot minor technical issues independently



Who We're Looking For

This role is best suited for someone with a technical or analytical background — IT, engineering, data, economics, or a related field — who has strong communication skills and is comfortable working in a fast-paced international environment.

Required:



Bachelor's degree in IT, Computer Science, Engineering, Economics, or a related technical field (or equivalent hands-on experience)

Minimum 2 years of experience in a similar role — lead generation, marketing operations, digital assistant, or technical support

Advanced English — written and spoken. You will correspond with international clients. Grammar, tone, and clarity are non-negotiable.

Expert-level Google Sheets / Excel — formulas, pivot tables, data organization

Hands-on experience with HubSpot, 
, or similar CRM / outreach platforms

Proficiency in Canva and PowerPoint for presentation and materials creation

Strong LinkedIn search and lead generation skills

Detail-oriented, self-organized, and able to meet deadlines independently



Strong plus:



Experience with LinkedIn Sales Navigator or 

Background in B2B marketing, tech, or PR/communications

Experience working with US or European clients directly

Familiarity with Adobe Photoshop, CapCut, or Adobe Premiere Pro





What We Offer



100% remote — work from anywhere

Long-term, stable position with strong preference for internal growth

Direct exposure to international clients and global markets

Clear processes, no micromanagement

Performance-based salary increases

Real growth path: Lead Gen Specialist ? Marketing Ops ? Senior Assistant / Team Lead





How to Apply

Send us a short message that includes:



A brief overview of your background and relevant experience (3–5 sentences)

Your English level and any experience communicating with international clients

One example of a research, data, or lead generation task you've completed

Tools you've worked with (Google Sheets, HubSpot, LinkedIn, AI tools, etc.)



We read every application personally. Candidates who meet our criteria will be invited to a short Zoom interview.

title: Video Editor For Social Media and Ads
description:
???? VIDEO EDITOR WANTED – FULL TIME (PHILIPPINES) – PERFORMANCE CONTENT (TIKTOK / ADS / SOCIAL)



If you are just a “video editor” who adds music and cuts clips…



? This is NOT for you.



If you understand how to make videos that GRAB attention, HOLD attention, and make people TAKE ACTION…



? Keep reading.



---



We are building a high-output content machine for a fast-growing fitness brand (Home Gym + Resistance Bands).



We are not looking for average.



We are looking for someone who understands:



• Hooks in the first 1–3 seconds

• Fast pacing + pattern interrupts

• Subtitles that actually get read

• Editing for retention, not just aesthetics

• Short-form content (TikTok, Reels, YouTube Shorts)



---



???? WHAT YOU’LL BE DOING:



• Editing 3–10 short-form videos per day

• Cutting long-form footage into viral clips

• Adding captions, zooms, sound effects, pacing

• Following proven content frameworks (we will train you)

• Turning raw footage into content that converts



---



???? COMPENSATION:



• Full-time position

• $600 – $1,100/month (based on skill + speed)

• Opportunity to grow as we scale



---



? THIS ROLE IS FOR YOU IF:



• You have experience editing TikTok / Reels / Shorts

• You understand viral content and retention

• You can work FAST without losing quality

• You follow instructions and hit deadlines

• You want long-term, stable work



---



???? DO NOT APPLY IF:



• You are slow

• You need constant supervision

• You only make “cinematic” edits

• You don’t understand short-form content



---



???? HOW TO APPLY:



1. Send 3–5 examples of your BEST short-form edits

2. Include the word “FLEX” in your application (to prove you read this)

3. Tell us your monthly rate

4. Tell us how many videos you can edit per day



---



???? BONUS (this will get you hired faster):



Record a short Loom video explaining:

• Why your edits perform well

• How you think about hooks + retention



---



We are hiring IMMEDIATELY.



If you’re good, you will have consistent work every week.



Let’s build something big.

title: Creative Stategist For Ecommerce Brand
description:
We're a growing direct-to-consumer brand and we're looking for a Creative Strategist to help us scale our paid social performance. This role is for someone who lives at the intersection of data and creativity — equally comfortable reading ad metrics and briefing a video shoot. You'll own how we think about creative, and you'll be the reason our Meta ads don't look like everyone else's.



What you'll do

-Develop and own our creative strategy for Meta — defining angles, hooks, formats, and messaging frameworks that drive performance

-Write detailed creative briefs for video editors, UGC creators, and designers, grounded in data and audience insight

-Analyse ad performance weekly — identifying winning creative patterns, diagnosing what's underperforming, and translating findings into the next brief

-Build and manage a structured testing framework to systematically iterate on hooks, visuals, CTAs, and ad formats

-Mine the Meta Ad Library and competitor landscape for trends, threats, and creative inspiration

-Collaborate closely with our media buyer to align creative output with bidding strategy and campaign structure

-Present weekly creative learnings to the team in a clear, actionable format



What we're looking for

-2–4 years of experience in a creative strategy, performance creative, or similar role at a DTC brand or agency

-Strong understanding of Meta's ad ecosystem — you know what a good hook rate, thumb-stop ratio, and CVR look like

-Excellent brief-writing skills — you can translate a data insight into a clear, inspiring creative direction

-Experience working with UGC creators, video editors, or in-house creative teams

-Comfortable in Meta Ads Manager and familiar with tools like Motion, Foreplay, or MagicBrief

-Strong written communication and an instinct for what resonates with consumers

-A portfolio or examples of creative work or strategy decks you've contributed to





Nice to have

Experience scripting or directing short-form video (Reels, TikTok-style content)

Background in copywriting or brand strategy

Familiarity with landing page and post-click optimisation

Key Responsibilities

Social Media Management: Create and schedule engaging content across
, X, Instagram, and TikTok. You will be responsible for turning our book covers and milestones into "scroll-stopping" posts.



Ad Campaign Management: Set up and optimize Meta 
/Instagram) and TikTok ads to drive traffic to our lead magnets and bookstore.

 Marketing: Manage our "Inner Circle" (MailPoet) subscriber list, creating automated welcome sequences and weekly newsletters.

title: Lead Generation & Appointment Setter
description:
**About the Role**



We are a UK-based financial advisory firm working with accountancy practices and professional networks to distribute business protection services. We're looking for a proactive, articulate, and self-motivated Virtual Assistant to take ownership of our outreach and lead generation activity.



This is a front-facing role. You will represent the firm in conversations with prospects — sometimes acting on behalf of the principal directly, sometimes as a representative of the business. Either way, professionalism, judgement, and strong English communication are essential.



---



**What You'll Be Doing**



› Researching and identifying accountancy firms, independent accountants, SMEs, and small professional offices (translation, legal, HR, etc.) as prospective leads

› Managing and posting on LinkedIn — not for social engagement, but targeted outreach and connection-building with decision-makers

› Conducting outreach and follow-up via WhatsApp Business and other messaging channels

› Sending and managing
s to warm and cold prospects

› Booking discovery calls and meetings directly into the principal's diary

› Monitoring and responding to inbound messages across platforms

› Maintaining a clear pipeline log — tracking outreach, responses, follow-ups, and outcomes

› Suggesting and testing new outreach approaches over time



---



**Who We're Looking For**



› Fluent, confident written and spoken English — this is non-negotiable

› Experience in outreach, lead generation, appointment setting, or sales support

› Comfortable representing a professional services firm in direct conversation with business owners and accountants

› Organised and reliable — managing a diary and following up across multiple channels simultaneously

› Proactive and resourceful — you don't wait to be told; you identify opportunities and act

› Familiar with LinkedIn, WhatsApp Business, and
 outreach strategies

› Available during UK business hours (GMT/BST) — this is a firm requirement



---



**Platforms You'll Work On**



LinkedIn · WhatsApp Business ·
/Instagram ·
 · Diary/Calendar



---



**Trial Period**



The role starts as a part-time trial at $3/hour, 25 hours per week (5 hours per day). Hours must align with UK business hours. Successful candidates will have the opportunity to grow with the firm as activity scales.



---



**Screening Task**



To be considered, you must complete the following task. Applications without it will not be reviewed.



*Task: Write a Cold LinkedIn Connection Request*



Write a LinkedIn connection request message as if you were reaching out on behalf of a UK-based financial advisory firm to the owner or senior partner of a small accountancy practice.



Your message should:

· Be under 300 characters (LinkedIn's connection note limit)

· Sound natural and human — not like a template

· Give a clear, relevant reason for connecting

· Not pitch a product or service directly



There is no single right answer. We are looking at your judgement, tone, and understanding of professional outreach.



---



**How to Apply**



Send us your completed screening task along with a short introduction — tell us who you are, your experience with LinkedIn outreach or lead generation, and any results you've achieved (meetings booked, response rates, campaigns run). Specific examples carry far more weight than general claims.



Applications will be reviewed and scored. Only those who complete the task will be considered.

title: Especialista em Aquisição de 100 Avaliações para Saas na Shopify App Store
description:
We are looking for a specialist in review acquisition for our new SaaS, which will be launched on the Shopify App Store.



The main objective is to obtain 100 reviews from Shopify store owners in the United States to improve our ranking within the Shopify App Store.



The professional will be responsible for:



Proactively identifying and reaching out to Shopify stores based in the United States.



Offering a 30-day free trial of our SaaS, clearly explaining its benefits (increased customer retention and store revenue).



Ensuring that store owners successfully install the SaaS on their store and use it effectively.



Following up with store owners during the trial period to ensure satisfaction and proper usage of the product.



Collecting reviews from store owners on the Shopify App Store.



We expect each cycle — outreach, installation, trial usage, and review collection — to take approximately 3 days.



The initial goal is to reach 100 reviews within 2 weeks or less, as the free trial offer will be discontinued after this milestone. Speed in acquiring reviews is critical for a successful launch.



We are looking for a professional with excellent communication skills, proactivity and ownership, experience in prospecting and client relationship management, and preferably experience in e-commerce or SaaS.

title: YouTube & Social Media Assistant (Boxing Content)
description:
I'm looking for a part-time Virtual Assistant to support an established boxing channel (Instagram and Tik Tok) for primarily YouTube (BoxingSense) focused on long-term development, education and structured training. The focus at this stage is to use the content to direct like-minded people into an online community hosted on Skool.



This role is focused on execution, time-saving with potential input on creative direction for YouTube based on Skool or YouTube progress. You will assist with content packaging, editing support and platform management while following clear guidelines.



Core Responsibilities

- Improve YouTube thumbnails (clean, clear messaging and with the goal to eventually develop the brand)

- Assist with refining video topics based on YouTube SEO

- Repurpose long-form YouTube content into short-form clips (Reels / Shorts)

- Add simple hooks and structure to long-form videos (based on provided guidance)

- Upload and optimise YouTube videos (titles, descriptions, tags, chapters)



Bonus (Not Required)

- Interest in boxing or combat sports

- Experience working with educational or coaching content

- Understanding of short-form content pacing



Expectations

- Prefers structure over creativity

- Can follow systems and improve over time

- Maintain a clean, minimal, non-hype style

- Prioritise clarity over flashy edits

- Communicates clearly and meet deadlines

- Reliable and consistent

- Open to feedback and revisions



Tools / Software (Preferred)

- CapCut / Premiere Pro (or similar editing software) I have been using CapCut to edit the thumbnails and making videos

- Canva or Capcut (for thumbnails)

- YouTube Studio

- Google Drive (file organisation)



This is a long-term role with room to grow as the channel develops.



Application Instructions

Please include the word knockout in your subject line or first sentence so we know you’ve read the full job post.  



In your application, please answer the following:

1. If given a 5-minute boxing training video, how would you select 2–3 clips for short-form content?

2. What makes a short boxing video compelling enough for someone to want to learn more or join a coaching group?

3. How would you balance keeping content simple and structured while still making it engaging?

Please also include:



Links to samples of your edited Reels or Shorts

Examples of content that performed well (e.g. strong views, engagement, or growth)

Any proof of managing or improving social media accounts (if available)

title: Video Editor — Screen Recording Assembly (Part-Time / Contract)
description:

You'll receive screen recordings and your job is to cypher through the footage, cut the dead space, and assemble clean, watchable videos. No fancy editing required — just sharp cuts and logical flow.



For this project:



Review raw screen recordings

Cut, trim, and arrange clips into a coherent final video

Remove mistakes, pauses, and dead air

Deliver clean exports ready to publish





This project needs:



No animations

No B-roll

No motion graphics

No color grading

No thumbnail design

Just clean assembly editing. If you can cut clips together and make them flow, you're qualified.



What We're Looking For:



You can work in DaVinci Resolve, Premiere Pro, CapCut, or Final Cut

You have a sharp eye for what to cut and what to keep

You can turn around edits quickly (24-48 hours)

You follow simple instructions without overcomplicating things

Reliable communication — you respond within a few hours, not a few days



Growth Path:



Start here. Prove you can deliver clean, on-time edits consistently. There will be opportunities to take on bigger projects if your work is up to par — full YouTube videos, animations, multi-camera edits, and more complex post-production work.



Your reliability and attention to detail in this role is what earns you the bigger projects.



To Apply Please Send:



1. 1-2 samples of editing work (even personal projects are fine)

2. A short summary of why you'd be a good fit

title: Data Extraction and Automation Specialist
description:
Company Overview



We are seeking a skilled Data Extraction and Automation Specialist who understands modern web scraping, lead data enrichment, automation workflows, and structured data management. Availability during U.S. Eastern hours is required.



Position Overview



We are hiring a Web Scraping and Lead Data Automation Specialist to support advanced list building, structured data extraction, and enrichment workflows. This role focuses on pulling targeted lead data at scale using Apify, Python, Clay, and APIs.



This is a hands on technical role for someone who understands scraping logic, selectors, pagination, anti-bot challenges, deduplication, and data normalization.



Key Responsibilities



• Build and maintain lead scraping workflows using Apify actors or Python

• Extract structured data from websites, directories, databases, and public sources

• Handle pagination, login flows, rate limits, and anti-scraping mechanisms

• Clean, dedupe, and normalize datasets

• Enrich scraped data using Clay

• Connect scraped and enriched data to CRM systems, Google Sheets, or CSV exports

• Build or integrate APIs for data transfer when needed

• Document scraping workflows and error handling processes

• Monitor automation health and troubleshoot broken workflows

• Deliver clean, structured lead lists ready for outbound campaigns



Qualifications



• Proven experience with web scraping using Apify or Python

• Strong understanding of HTML, CSS selectors, DOM structure

• Experience handling structured data formats such as JSON, CSV, and Excel

• Familiarity with REST APIs and authentication methods

• Experience using Clay for data enrichment

• Ability to troubleshoot scraping failures and adjust extraction logic

• Strong organizational skills and documentation habits

• Availability during U.S. Eastern hours



Preferred Skills



• Experience scraping education, healthcare, legal, or local business databases

• Familiarity with n8n, Zapier, or Make

• Experience integrating scraped data into Instantly, Apollo, Go High Level, or other CRMs

• Understanding of proxy management and anti-bot mitigation



Compensation



Pay is negotiable based on experience and technical depth.



Application Process



To apply for this position, candidates MUST complete all of the following steps:

 1. Submit a resume outlining web scraping and automation experience.

 2. Upload examples or screenshots of previous scraping projects or data extraction workflows.

 3. Submit a newly recorded video introduction where you:

• State the current date

• Explain your experience with web scraping, Apify, Python, and Clay

• Describe a scraping workflow you built and how you handled errors or blocked requests



Important Application Instructions



• Applications must be submitted through this link: 
/4130RpL

• Applications submitted directly on other platforms will not be reviewed

• All steps must be completed to be considered

description:
Role Summary 



The Senior Accountant (Lead) is singularly responsible for all accounting, finance, and administrative needs of a small communications and marketing company with approximately 10 full-time employees, 10 +/- steady 1099 consultants, and additional staff/contractors that fluctuate to meet contract-by-contract client service needs. The Senior Accountant owns day-to-day accounting and bookkeeping operations, produces GAAP-compliant financials, manages budgeting and cash flow forecasting, supports client/job costing, and ensures accurate reconciliation of paid media buys. The Senior Accountant (Lead) will administer payroll (via ADP or QuickBooks), ?maintain strong internal controls and documentation, and prepare monthly GAAP compliant financial statements.? 

 



Key Responsibilities 



*Full-Cycle Accounting & Close 

*Own and execute the full-cycle accounting function (A/P, A/R, general ledger, journal entries, accruals, and month-end close). 

*Prepare and deliver monthly/quarterly/year-end financial statements in accordance with GAAP (Generally Accepted Accounting Principles). 

*Maintain a clean chart of accounts and ensure accurate coding/classification of all transactions. 

*Manage bank, credit card and balance sheet reconciliations; investigate and resolve discrepancies. 

*Manage vendor billing and client invoicing. 

*QuickBooks Online Ownership 

*Serve as QBO administrator, maintaining classes and projects, and optimizing QuickBooks Online (QBO) configuration, workflow integrity, and reporting. 

*Ensure QBO data integrity and clean documentation supporting all accounting activity and audit readiness. 



USA Taxes 

*Maintain accurate tax records 

*Support external tax preparer (CPA) 

*Coordinate quarterly and annual filings, including support of K1 owners tax filing needs. 



Budgeting & Cash Flow Forecasting 

*Build and maintain annual budgets in QuickBooks Online (or supported tools tied into QBO)? 

*Maintain updated project-level forecasts, including P&L by job/client contract 

*Maintain and update cash flow forecasts based on revenue forecasts from Executive Management, as well as receivables, payables, payroll timing, and media/client commitments.   

*Provide leadership with visibility into cash needs and variances, runway, and actual spending vs. planned. 



Time Tracking & Client/Job Costing 

*Track employee hours (TimeIQ or QBO timekeeper) and allocate/charge time to the appropriate billable client jobs/accounts. 

*Support client billing, reporting, and internal profitability analysis by client/project, including labor, ODC, travel and paid media pass-through allocations. 



Media Buy Reconciliation (U.S. Broadcast & Digital) 

*Reconcile media buys acrossbroadcast, digital, social, and programmatic placements.   

*Match vendor invoices to insertion orders (IOs), schedules, impressions/units, and proof-of-performance.   

*Flag and resolve discrepancies and coordinate resolution with internal stakeholders and vendors. 

*Ensure accurate pass-through billings and QBO bookings. 



Administration & Payroll 

*Prepare and process payroll using QuickBooks. 

*Maintain payroll records, ensure hours and allocations are correct, and support periodic payroll reporting. 

*Maintain accurate deductions, job allocations, and payroll documentation.   

*Manage payroll changes related to onboarding/offboarding. 

*HR/ Benefits Administration (Accounting Perspective) 

*Manage financial onboarding/offboarding, payroll setup, and benefit deductions.   

*Ensure timely renewals and payments for all benefit programs (medical/dental/vision insurance, 401K contributions and payments, etc). 

*Maintain insurance renewals, payments, COIs, and compliance. 

*Administrative Support (as needed for a small company) 

*Support routine finance/admin needs typical of a lean organization (vendor setup, documentation, basic process creation, etc.). 

*Maintain organized records for audits, tax preparation, and compliance (in coordination with external providers, if applicable). 

*Administer government and client invoice portals, registration portals, and required reporting.   

*Maintain multi-state business registrations and renewals (FL, CA, TX, GA, etc.), and pays annual or regularly scheduled fees on-time..   

*Manage Duns & Bradstreet profile to maintain excellent standing.? 



Required Qualifications 

*6+ years of full-cycle accounting experience; experience as sole or lead accountant.   

*Significant, hands-on experience serving as the primary accountant for a small business (owning end-to-end accounting). 

*Advanced proficiency with QuickBooks Online?(required). 

*Demonstrated ability to prepare GAAP-compliant financial statements. 

*Strong experience building budgets and cash flow forecasts, ideally within or alongside QBO. 

*Experience with timekeeping and allocating labor to billable client accounts (job costing/project accounting). 

*Experience reconciling complex vendor billing against orders—ideally including media buy reconciliation. 

*Payroll processing experience (via QuickBooks Payroll). 

*Experience with government portals, client invoicing systems, and multi-state compliance.   

*High attention to detail, strong organization, and ability to work independently with minimal oversight. 



Preferred Qualifications 

*Experience in advertising/media, agencies, or environments with media buying, proper allocation of labor hours per client billable work and vendor reconciliations. 

*Experience improving/standardizing processes and internal controls in a small company setting. 



Key Competencies 

*Ownership mentality and ability to operate independently 

*Strong judgment and discretion with confidential information 

*Clear communication with non-finance stakeholders 

*Deadline management (close, payroll, vendor cycles) 

*Analytical problem-solving and reconciliation skills 



*****How to apply*****

Please send your resume and cover letter to

title: Service Titan Dispatcher
description:
Dispatcher

Focus: Logistics, technician management, and ServiceTitan proficiency.



Job Overview:

Plumbing, Cooling, and Electrical Nerds is seeking a sharp, fast-thinking Dispatcher to lead our field team to success. You aren't just moving jobs around; you are a strategist who ensures our technicians are in the right place at the right time to maximize revenue and customer satisfaction.



Daily Expectations:



- Manage the dispatch board in ServiceTitan to optimize technician routes.

- Communicate directly with technicians to provide job details and updates.

- Monitor job progress and adjust schedules in real-time to prevent delays.

- Ensure "sold" jobs are scheduled promptly and efficiently.

- Maintain a high level of communication between the field and the office.





Preferred Skills & Experience:



- Must have significant experience with ServiceTitan.

- Previous experience dispatching in the trades (Plumbing, HVAC, or Electrical).

- Ability to handle high-pressure situations and quick pivots.

- Strong geographical knowledge (or ability to use mapping tools rapidly).

- Excellent verbal communication skills for coordinating with field staff.

title: Customer Service Representative
description:
Customer Service Representative (CSR)



Focus: Inbound booking, empathy, and ServiceTitan entry.



Job Overview:

As a CSR for Plumbing, Cooling, and Electrical Nerds, you are the first point of contact for customers in need. Your goal is to provide a 5-star "Nerd" experience by listening to customer concerns, diagnosing their needs over the phone, and booking appointments with speed and empathy.



Daily Expectations:



- Handle inbound calls from customers regarding plumbing, cooling, and electrical issues.

- Book appointments directly into ServiceTitan following company protocols.

- Maintain a high "Booking Rate" by overcoming customer objections.

- Provide clear information regarding service fees and technician arrival windows.

- Ensure every customer feels heard and valued from the first "hello."



Preferred Skills & Experience:



- Must have ServiceTitan experience.

- Previous experience in a CSR role, specifically within the home service industry.

- Superior English verbal skills with a friendly, professional tone.

- Ability to multitask: typing notes into the CRM while speaking with the customer.

- A "problem-solver" mindset—you don't just take calls; you provide solutions.

title: Research & Claims Specialist (Unclaimed Funds / Asset Recovery)
description:
Company Name:

D.R.Y Asset Recovery



Job Overview:

We are a fast-growing U.S.-based company focused on helping individuals recover unclaimed surplus funds from tax and foreclosure sales.

We are looking for a highly detail-oriented and reliable Research & Claims Specialist to assist with locating surplus funds, identifying rightful owners, and supporting the claims process from start to finish.

This is a long-term opportunity with growth potential for the right candidate.



Key Responsibilities:

• Research county websites to locate surplus / excess funds lists

• Extract and organize property and owner data into spreadsheets

• Skip trace individuals to locate contact information

• Assist in preparing claim packages and required documents

• Track deadlines, claim statuses, and follow-ups

• Communicate updates clearly and maintain organized records

• Follow step-by-step SOPs and improve workflows when needed

  Must be comfortable and confident speaking to people on the phone



Requirements:

• Strong attention to detail (this is critical)

• Experience with online research and data entry

• Familiarity with Google Sheets / Excel

• Ability to follow instructions exactly without cutting corners

• Strong written English communication

• Reliable internet and ability to meet deadlines

Bonus (Not Required but Preferred):

• Experience with skip tracing tools

• Knowledge of U.S. real estate, tax sales, or foreclosure processes

• Experience with CRM systems or case tracking (such as Go High Level or Excess Elite)



Compensation:

• Starting at $3 / hour (will increase over time)

• Performance-based bonuses available

• Opportunity for long-term role and increased pay



Work Schedule:

• Part-time to start (20–30 hours/week)

• Opportunity to grow into full-time



How to Apply:

To be considered, follow these steps exactly. Incomplete applications will not be reviewed.

Location Preference:

 We are primarily looking for applicants based in Cebu, Philippines.

Subject Line:

 Use: DRY Recovery – Detail Matters

Voice Recording (Required):

 Submit a 1–2 minute voice recording covering the following:

 • Tell me about yourself

 • Describe your experience with research, data entry, or related work

 • Explain why attention to detail is important in this role

              (We are evaluating communication skills, clarity, and confidence.)

Internet & Availability:

 Provide:

 • Internet speed (screenshot)

 • Backup internet (if any)

 • Available hours per week

Experience Summary:

 Briefly list any experience related to:

 • Online research

 • Data entry

 • Skip tracing

 • Tax liens

 • Foreclosure or surplus funds research

 • Real estate research

 • Claims processing, case management, or document preparation

Final Step (Attention Test):

 At the very end of your application, include this exact line:

 “Detail confirmed: Cebu applicant ready.”



Applications that do not follow all steps will not be reviewed.



Why Join Us:

We don’t just hire VAs, we build long-term team members.

If you are dependable, detail-oriented, and want to grow with a company that is scaling quickly, this is a strong opportunity.

title: CUSTOMER SUCCESS MANAGER - HEALTHCARE SAAS PLATFORM
description:
CUSTOMER SUCCESS MANAGER - HEALTHCARE SAAS PLATFORM



We're a fast-growing US-based healthcare technology company seeking an experienced Customer Success Manager to lead client onboarding as we scale from pilot to national expansion.



ABOUT THE ROLE:

You'll be our first Customer Success hire, responsible for onboarding new healthcare clinics to our patient support platform. This role will grow significantly as we scale - starting with 5-10 clinics/month and expanding to 20-30+ clinics/month within 6-12 months as we go national.



GROWTH TRAJECTORY:

- Months 1-5: Onboard 5-10 clinics/month, build systems and training materials

- Months 6-12: Scale to 20-30+ clinics/month as volume increases, potential to lead a CS team

- This is a ground-floor opportunity with significant growth potential



YOUR RESPONSIBILITIES:

- Onboard new healthcare clinics via live Zoom training sessions during US business hours

- Create scalable training materials (videos, guides, documentation, SOPs)

- Conduct platform demonstrations and walk-throughs

- Upload and manage client data (CSV files, spreadsheets)

- Troubleshoot technical issues and provide ongoing support

- Build repeatable onboarding processes that can scale

- Track success metrics (time-to-onboard, client satisfaction, adoption rates)

- Eventually train and manage additional CS team members as we grow



IDEAL CANDIDATE:

- 2+ years customer success, client onboarding, or training experience

- SaaS or BPO background (healthcare experience strongly preferred)

- Excellent English communication (written and verbal) - must be comfortable on video calls with US clients

- Tech-savvy: comfortable with Google Sheets, Zoom, CRM tools, screen sharing

- Process-oriented: able to document and systematize workflows for scale

- Growth mindset: excited to build something from the ground up

- Available to work US Eastern business hours (9am-5pm EST = 9pm-5am Manila time) for live client interactions

- Night shift experience preferred - this is a US time zone role



WHAT WE OFFER:

- Starting salary: $1,000-1,250/month USD (based on experience)

- Part-time to start (20 hours/week) with expectation of full-time within 5-6 months

- US Eastern business hours schedule (9pm-5am Manila time) - ideal for night shift professionals

- Flexible schedule within US business hours based on client call availability

- Salary increases as you transition to full-time and as company scales

- Clear growth path: Senior CS Manager ? CS Team Lead ? Head of Customer Success

- Fully remote work - no commute required

- Work directly with founder and technical team

- Mission-driven US healthcare company improving patient outcomes

- Performance bonuses tied to client success metrics



COMPENSATION STRUCTURE:

We're looking for someone who wants to grow with us. As our client base scales over the next 18 months, your role and compensation can scale as well.



- Starting (Months 1-3): $1,000-1,250/month for 20 hrs/week

- Transition to full-time (Months 5-6): $2,200-2,500/month for 40 hrs/week

- Senior role consideration around Months 12-18 as you manage team/processes

- Performance bonuses tied to client retention and satisfaction metrics



TO APPLY:

Please include in your application:

1. Brief summary of your customer success/onboarding experience

2. Any healthcare or SaaS background you have

3. Confirm your availability for US Eastern business hours (9pm-5am Manila time)

4. Why you're interested in a ground-floor growth opportunity

5. Examples of processes or systems you've built at previous roles



We're hiring immediately for our launch. Apply today!

title: Marketing & Sales Support Coordinator
description:
Marketing & Sales Support Coordinator (Part-Time, Remote | Approx. 20–25 Hours/Week)



Falcon Paper & Trading is looking for a highly organized, hands-on Marketing & Sales Support Coordinator to help us improve our marketing presence, support lead generation, organize lead and customer information, run outreach and reactivation campaigns, and bring more structure to our marketing and sales support efforts.



This is a practical, execution-focused remote role for someone who is strong in written English, organized in their work, comfortable using modern digital tools, and able to manage recurring tasks with consistency and follow-through. We are not looking for a fluffy social media marketer or a pure salesperson. We need someone who can support marketing, lead generation, outreach, organization, and campaign execution in a way that is useful and measurable.



About Us

Falcon Paper & Trading is a paper trading and recycling company based in Miami. We work with paper, cardboard, recycling programs, inventory movement, and operational solutions for businesses. We are looking for someone who can help us build a stronger marketing presence while also supporting lead generation, sales-related follow-up, outreach, and customer organization.



Important to Know

We currently do not have a strong social media presence, so part of this role will involve helping us build and organize that presence from the ground up across platforms like LinkedIn,
, and Instagram in a practical and professional way.



Hours

Approximately 20–25 hours per week. Some flexibility is okay, but some overlap with Miami business hours is preferred.



Key Responsibilities



* Organize and clean up lead lists, customer databases, and outreach records

* Support lead generation through research, list building, prospect identification, and outreach preparation

* Segment leads and customers by type, status, and opportunity

* Support outreach to current, inactive, and prospective clients

* Send inventory
s, reactivation campaigns, and other client-facing communications

* Help build and organize our social media presence from the ground up across LinkedIn,
, and Instagram

* Help improve our website, Google presence, and digital marketing materials

* Support campaign creation, scheduling, and tracking

* Help coordinate review requests, marketing materials, and branding projects

* Assist with projects such as truck wrap coordination, one-pagers, and marketing assets

* Use modern digital and AI tools to improve speed, quality, and organization

* Report weekly on completed work, campaign activity, lead generation efforts, and next priorities



Who We’re Looking For



* Strong written English

* Highly organized and comfortable working with spreadsheets, lists, and systems

* Experience in marketing coordination, lead generation, sales support, campaign execution, outreach support, or related work

* Comfortable using a variety of modern AI and digital tools for research, writing, organization, and content support

* Able to work independently and turn ideas into finished work

* Good judgment, strong follow-through, and attention to detail

* Comfortable working in a fast-moving small business environment

* Experience with Canva or similar design tools, Google Workspace, CRM tools,
 platforms, and social/media tools is a plus

* B2B, industrial, logistics, recycling, or operations-related experience is a plus



**Success in This Role Looks Like**



* Lead and customer information becomes more organized and usable

* Lead generation becomes more structured and consistent

* Old clients are contacted more regularly

* Campaigns are sent and tracked properly

* Social media presence is built in a more professional and consistent way

* Marketing presence becomes stronger overall

* Projects move forward without constant supervision



**To Apply**

Please send:



1. Your resume

2. A short paragraph about why you are a fit for this role

3. Examples of relevant work you have handled

4. A short note explaining what digital and AI tools you use regularly in your work

5. Your expected monthly compensation for a part-time remote role

6. A brief explanation of how you would approach your first 30 days in this role





We are looking for someone practical, organized, proactive, and strong at execution.
