title: Amazon Germany Sales & Listing Optimiser - Top Level
description:
We are a fast-growing ecommerce business managing multiple brands across Amazon Europe. We are looking for an experienced Amazon Germany Account Analyst with a minimum of 5 years hands-on experience in the German Amazon marketplace.



This role is focused on daily performance analysis, keyword ranking, SEO optimisation and competitor tracking, with the goal of improving organic visibility and driving sales growth in Germany.





Key Responsibilities



Daily Sales & Performance Analysis

 • Monitor and analyse daily sales performance on Amazon Germany

 • Identify trends, issues and opportunities across key metrics

 • Report on sales, sessions, conversion rate and returns





Keyword Ranking & SEO Optimisation

 • Track keyword rankings using tools (e.g. Helium 10)

 • Identify opportunities to improve organic ranking and indexing

 • Optimise titles, bullet points and backend search terms for the German market

 • Ensure listings are fully optimised for German language and search behaviour





Listing & Conversion Optimisation

 • Review and improve product listings to increase conversion

 • Ensure images, A+ content and copy are aligned with German customer expectations

 • Suggest improvements based on performance data and customer feedback







Competitor & Market Analysis

 • Monitor key competitors within the German marketplace

 • Analyse pricing, keywords, reviews and positioning

 • Identify trends and recommend actions to maintain competitiveness





Continuous Growth & Optimisation

 • Identify underperforming products and implement improvements

 • Continuously test and refine SEO and conversion strategies

 • Provide actionable insights to drive sales growth



Requirements (Essential)

 • Minimum 5+ years experience managing Amazon Germany (DE marketplace)

 • Proven track record of improving rankings, SEO and sales performance

 • Strong understanding of German Amazon SEO and customer behaviour

 • Experience with tools such as Helium 10, Jungle Scout or similar

 • Strong analytical and problem-solving skills

 • Fluent English (German is highly preferred)



Highly Desirable

 • Experience managing other German ecommerce channels (e.g. Otto, Kaufland, Zalando, Shopify DE)

 • Experience with A+ content and listing image optimisation

 • Ability to analyse and improve conversion rates

 • Experience working with international ecommerce brands







What Success Looks Like

 • Improved keyword rankings across priority products

 • Increased organic sales in Amazon Germany

 • Highly optimised listings (SEO + conversion)

 • Clear reporting and proactive identification of growth opportunities

title: Inventory Planner & Merchandiser (Ecommerce)
description:
Overview



We are a fast-growing ecommerce business managing multiple brands across Amazon and other online channels. We are looking for a highly analytical Inventory Planner & Merchandiser to manage stock levels, forecast demand and ensure we maximise sales while avoiding overstock and stockouts.



This role is critical to ensuring the right products are in stock, at the right time, across all key markets and seasonal periods.



Key Responsibilities



 Sales & Forecast Analysis



 • Analyse weekly sales performance vs forecast across all products

 • Identify trends in fast-moving and slow-moving SKUs

 • Highlight risks such as under-forecasting, overstocking or declining sales



Market-Level Stock Planning (UK & EU)



 • Analyse sales split between UK and EU marketplaces 

 • Determine where stock is required based on market demand and sales trends

 • Ensure correct allocation of inventory between UK and EU warehouses

 • Identify opportunities to rebalance stock between regions to maximise sales and availability



Stock Planning & Management



 • Monitor stock levels and weeks of cover across all SKUs

 • Identify products at risk of selling out or overstocking

 • Ensure stock is aligned with sales velocity, geography and seasonality





Supply Chain & Delivery Tracking



 • Track inbound shipments and highlight delays or risks to availability

 • Ensure stock arrives at the right time for seasonality and demand peaks

 • Work closely with suppliers and internal teams to resolve issues





Merchandising & Commercial Planning



 • Work with the sales team to build a long-term view of stock requirements

 • Ensure stock supports planned promotions, deal events and peak periods

 • Help prevent:

 • Overstock (cash tied up)

 • Stockouts during key selling periods

 • Late arrivals missing seasonal demand



Reporting & Insights



 • Provide clear weekly reports on:

 • Stock health

 • Forecast vs actual performance

 • UK vs EU stock allocation

 • Key risks and opportunities

 • Recommend actions to improve availability and efficiency





Requirements



 • Experience in inventory planning, merchandising or supply chain (ecommerce preferred)

 • Strong analytical skills (Excel / Google Sheets essential)

 • Experience working with sales forecasts and stock allocation across regions

 • Ability to interpret data and make commercial recommendations

 • High attention to detail and organisation







Highly Desirable



 • Experience with Amazon EU (UK + DE + EU5 markets)

 • Understanding of cross-border inventory and fulfilment (FBA / EFN / PAN-EU)

 • Experience with AI and tools like Linnworks or inventory systems

 • Background in consumer goods or fast-moving products





What Success Looks Like



 • Minimal stockouts across UK and EU markets

 • Efficient stock allocation between regions

 • Reduced overstock and excess inventory

 • Stock aligned with seasonality, demand and promotions

 • Clear visibility of risks before they happen

title: Lead Generation Specialist
description:
We are in need of a Lead Generation Specialist who can:

a. Support our sales team by sourcing leads using LINKEDIN SALES NAVIGATOR and a variety of websites online (organic search) and vet the quality of leads obtained by checking the lead's website AND social media pages

b. Source leads for a multitude of clients using our lead generation software and a variety of websites online and vet the quality of leads obtained by checking the lead's online reviews and Google ratings

c. Double-checking the validity and accuracy of the PoC name, phone numbers, and
 addresses obtained by cross-referencing the obtained information from the business's website and/or social media page

d) Create weekly and monthly reports 



Skills / attributes we're looking for:

a) Proven experience with online lead search and maintaining leads databases

b) Proficient in Google Workspace (Google Sheets mainly)

c) Strong project and time management skills

d) Tech-savvy and resourceful

e) Excellent English communication skills, both written and verbal

f) Problem-solving and critical thinking skills: being able to think on your feet and quickly determine the path forward when faced with an obstacle

g) Proactive attitude

h) Able to work on a graveyard shift

i) Experience working with Western companies



Requirements:

a) You must be working from the Philippines

b) You must be willing to work as an independent contractor

c) Has a main and backup working computer

d) Has a main and backup internet

e) Has a plan or back up for power outages



Other information:

a) This is a 40-hour per week role.

b) No paid vacations / no paid holidays but you can take time off when you'd like and work more the days surrounding time off to ensure you're still paid for 40 hours.

c) 13th month will be honored as follows: the number of months worked, divided by 12, times your average monthly earnings.

d) Pay starts at 150 USD per week and we pay weekly via Gusto.



The role is primarily data research and entry; mainly we will be contracting you to search leads and the lead's information and validate these leads. 



NOTE: Only qualified candidates will be invited to take the assessment & scheduled for the interview(s). Please send me a well-written paragraph on why I should consider your application and why you are a great fit for this role we're looking to fill.



If you only send a link to your resume, a one-sentence
, or a generic application letter, you will not be considered for the position.



Thank you for your time and interest.

title: Hiring: Full-Time AI Video Creator
description:
I'm looking for one highly motivated individual to join me long-term in a flexible, daily work position creating AI-generated TikTok videos. This is perfect for someone who values consistent pay, works independently, and wants to grow with a creative team.

Compensation:

Base Pay: $450/month

Pay Cycle: Paid every 15 days (50%)

Bonus: Earn extra based on output — the more videos you make, the more you earn. One of my creators recently made an extra $1,300 in a single month!

Important: This role requires reliability. Bad communication or no-shows are not tolerated. We need you every day. (Open to discussing one day off per week.)

Requirements:



Must have a good laptop or PC — no slow or outdated devices

Strong, stable internet connection is non-negotiable

Must work 7 days a week (~4 hours/day, flexible schedule)

Must know your way around AI tools — especially Higgsfield and Google Flow

Strong English skills — content is created for U.S. audiences

Self-driven and independent — minimal micromanagement



Bonus Points:



Prior experience creating AI-generated video content

Skill in AI prompt writing and image generation



How to Apply:

Add me on 

Send a message titled "TikTok video creator" and tell me:



Your name

A description or example of your experience with AI tools or TikTok videos

Why you think you'd be a good fit



Serious and committed applicants only. Stable, long-term opportunity with real earning potential.

title: Hiring: Full-Time AI Video Creator
description:
I'm looking for one highly motivated individual to join me long-term in a flexible, daily work position creating AI-generated TikTok videos. This is perfect for someone who values consistent pay, works independently, and wants to grow with a creative team.

Compensation:

Your name

title: Recruiter for Appointment Setter Hiring
description:
Recruiter for Appointment Setter Hiring



Remote | Full-Time | Base Pay + Hiring Bonuses



We are hiring a recruiter to help us find and screen appointment setters for our team at TaskPilot.



This role is focused on helping us hire people for an outbound calling position. These appointment setters speak with US business owners and either transfer live calls or book appointments for our closer.



The goal of this role is to help us consistently bring on 8 new hires per week as part of a 2 person recruiting team.



You will be part of a 2 person hiring team focused on finding, screening, onboarding, and helping new hires start strong and stay on track. We already have sales promos and hiring materials in place, but we are open to changes and good ideas.



This is a team based role, but we still want people who can take ownership, move fast, and use good judgment without needing constant direction.



Responsibilities



• Post and manage job ads  

• Review applications  

• Follow up with candidates  

• Request and review audio samples  

• Screen for spoken English, confidence, and professionalism  

• Shortlist strong candidates  

• Help move candidates through the hiring process  

• Help new hires get started and stay on track



Where You Can Find Candidates



• OnlineJobs.ph  

•
 groups  

• Referrals  

• Other channels you already know how to use



Requirements



• Experience in recruiting, hiring, sales, appointment setting, call center work, or BPO  

• Strong written English  

• Organized and dependable  

• Able to work independently  

• Good judgment when evaluating people  

• Comfortable reviewing audio and screening for confidence, professionalism, and phone ability  

• Experience helping new hires get started, stay accountable, and perform well in the early stage of a role



Preferred



• Experience hiring for BPO, call center, appointment setting, or sales roles  

• Experience working in a BPO or call center environment  

• Management, team lead, or supervisory experience in recruiting, sales, call center, or BPO environments  

• Comfortable creating and using simple roleplay exercises as part of the screening process



Pay

Officially starts means the hire completes onboarding and begins working.

Mike

title: Online Math/Science Teacher(Near-Native Accent)
description:
About Pomelo Academy

Pomelo Academy is an innovative online international school dedicated to delivering high-quality education to students worldwide. We provide a dynamic and engaging learning environment, catering to individualized instruction that transcends geographical boundaries.



Job Description

We are seeking passionate and experienced Near-Native English-speaking Online K-12 Math and/or Science Teachers with verifiable teaching certifications. The ideal candidates will have strong academic backgrounds in Mathematics and/or Science, experience teaching young learners (ages 5–18), and a commitment to creating a supportive, inquiry-based, and engaging online learning environment.



Responsibilities



Deliver interactive and engaging Math and/or Science lessons to individuals and small groups of 2–6 students aged 5–18.

Teach using internationally recognized curricula such as A Closer Look, Glencoe Science, Pearson Interactive Science, NGSS-aligned resources, Singapore Math, or IB/AP/A Level Math programs.

Create age-appropriate lesson plans focused on conceptual understanding, inquiry, problem-solving, and real-world applications.

Incorporate visuals, multimedia, and hands-on virtual activities to make abstract concepts accessible and engaging.

Monitor student progress and provide timely feedback to students and parents.

Foster curiosity, discussion, and active learning in a safe and supportive space.



Qualifications



Professional teacher with at least 2 years of teaching experience (Kindergarten–Grade 12).

Must hold a valid teaching license/certification (e.g., Teaching License, State Certification). TESOL/TEFL is a plus.

Near-native English accent with excellent spoken and written communication skills.

Strong academic background in Mathematics and/or Science (Biology, Physics, Chemistry, General Science).

Experience teaching in public/international schools or reputable online platforms.

Familiarity with inquiry-based and/or interdisciplinary approaches (e.g., STEM/STEAM).

Comfortable working between 07:00–22:00 (Weekdays) and 9:00–22:00 (Weekends), GMT+8.

Proficiency with digital platforms such as ClassIn, Microsoft Office, and other educational technologies.

Must have a stable and fast internet connection and a PC/laptop with at least Windows 10 or Mac OS Catalina.



Benefits



Flexible working hours.

Opportunity to teach using globally respected Math and Science curricula.

Be part of an international, passionate team of educators.

Access to training and professional development.

Regular enrollment model (not a booking system), ensuring schedule stability and consistency

title: Social Media VA - DM Setter
description:
We are a fast-growing online fitness coaching business helping clients transform their bodies and lives through personalised programming and coaching support. We are looking for a highly motivated, people-focused Instagram DM Setter to join our team.



Your primary mission is simple: start real conversations with our new followers, build rapport, understand their goals, and book qualified sales calls with our coach. You will be the first touchpoint for potential clients — your energy and communication style directly impacts our growth.



Daily DM Outreach

Proactively message 100–150 new followers every day using our approved conversation scripts

Warm up cold leads with genuine, value-first conversations

Qualify prospects by understanding their fitness goals, struggles, and timeline

Transition qualified leads to book a strategy/sales call with the coach



Lead Management

Track all conversations and lead statuses in our CRM or tracking sheet

Follow up with warm leads who have not yet booked a call

Flag unresponsive or unqualified leads and remove from active pipeline

Maintain a clean, organised DM pipeline at all times



Profile & Follower Growth Support

Engage authentically with story replies, comments, and reactions to increase visibility

Support follower growth efforts alongside paid follower ads (target: 200–300 new followers/day)

Identify high-intent followers based on engagement patterns



Reporting & Communication

Submit a daily end-of-shift report with: conversations started, calls booked, leads in pipeline

Flag any issues with scripts, objections, or unusual lead behaviour to the coach

Attend brief weekly check-in call with coach to review performance and adjust approach



WHAT WE ARE LOOKING FOR:

Must-Haves

Excellent written English — professional, warm, and conversational tone

Prior experience as an IG DM Setter or appointment setter (minimum 3 months)

Comfortable with high-volume outreach (100+ DMs per day)

Reliable internet connection and dedicated workspace

Highly organised, self-motivated, and able to work with minimal supervision

Familiarity with Instagram and how the algorithm/DM system works



Nice-to-Haves

Background in fitness, health, or wellness (personal or professional)

Experience with GoHighLevel, Notion, or CRM tools

Understanding of basic sales psychology and objection handling

Previous work with a coaching business or personal brand





 HOW TO APPLY:

To be considered for this role, please send the following to [INSERT
 / IG HANDLE]:



A short video introduction (60–90 seconds) — tell us about yourself and why you are a great fit

Your CV / resume with relevant experience highlighted

A sample of a DM conversation you have started (screenshot welcome)

Your availability and preferred shift hours (Philippine time)

Subject line / DM opener: “I am your next setter — [YOUR NAME]”



Applications without a video introduction will not be reviewed.

title: High-Performance Real Estate Cold Caller (SDR)
description:
Base Pay + Performance Commission (Wholesale Platform Experience a Plus!)



The Role:

I am a Real Estate Business Owner building a national acquisition team. I am looking for a highly motivated, thick-skinned, and persuasive Cold Callers to join my team. Your mission is simple: Call homeowners, gauge their motivation to sell, and book qualified discovery calls for me to close.



What You’ll Be Doing:



Making 100–150+ outbound dials per day using RESimpli.



Targeting specific lists: Pre-Foreclosures, Absentee Owners, and High-Equity leads.



Using a "Pillars of Motivation" framework to qualify sellers (Condition, Timeline, Motivation, Price).



Overcoming objections like "How did you get my number?" and "I’m not interested" with professional persistence.



Accurately logging every call and setting follow-up tasks in the CRM.



What’s In It For You?



Base Pay: $5.00 – $7.00 per hour.



Qualified Lead Bonus: $20 for every lead that completes a call with me.



Growth: I am scaling a national team. Top performers will move into Lead Manager or Team Lead roles.



Requirements:



Perfect English: You must have high-level English fluency with a clear, professional, and empathetic tone.



Experience: Minimum 1 year of Real Estate Cold Calling (Wholesaling or Listing leads).



Tech Savvy: Familiarity with RESimpli, Mojo, or BatchDialer is a huge advantage.



Work Ethic: You don't take "No" personally and you stay consistent with your dials.



How To Apply (Read Carefully):

To be considered, you MUST do the following:



Start your application with the word "REALTY" so I know you read this.



Attach or link a 30–60 second Voice Recording of yourself introducing yourself and explaining why you’re a great closer. (Applications without audio will be ignored).



Briefly mention which Real Estate CRMs or Dialers you have used in the past.

title: $3,000+/Month Part-Time — Only 2 Spots Left
description:
We are hiring part-time remote Customer Success Managers. Only looking for candidates based in the Philippines with an active LinkedIn profile.



We are only accepting 2 more people into this round so apply fast.



Compensation:



$50 per month base salary paid via Wise on the 1st of every month. $150 commission per closed deal. No cap. Top performers are already earning $500 to $3,000+ per month. After 30 days you receive a free LinkedIn Sales Navigator upgrade worth $99 per month.



Referral bonus: Once you are onboarded you get a personal referral link. Every person you refer who joins earns you 10% of their monthly pay as a recurring bonus. Refer 10 people and that is an extra $50+ per month on top of everything else.



What the role involves:



You will represent our company on LinkedIn as part of our remote sales team. During onboarding we set up your profile and connect our internal tools. Our senior team manages all outreach and strategy. You monitor inbound messages from prospects and flag warm leads. Flexible schedule. No fixed hours. No micromanagement.



Requirements:



LinkedIn account with 500 or more connections and a profile photo. Strong English communication skills. Wise account or willingness to create one. Google Chrome on a laptop or PC.



No prior sales experience needed. We provide full training and onboarding support.



This is filling up fast. Apply now before spots close.

title: Performance Creatives Video Editor Role + Paid Trial Task
description:
We're zocialGen, a creative agency that specialises in performance ads for Meta and TikTok. 



We're looking for a video editor who can produce high-performing ad creatives - including Pixar/Dreamworks-style 3D animated ads using AI tools.



You've probably seen these viral animated ads on TikTok and Reels - 3D Pixar-style characters, cinematic lighting, short-form vertical video. We produce these at scale for our DTC clients and need someone who already knows how to make them or can pick it up fast.

This role involves:



Creating Pixar/Dreamworks-style 3D animated short-form ads using AI generation tools

Writing prompts for AI image generators and AI video animation tools

Editing and stitching animated clips into polished 9:16 and 4:5 ad creatives

Adding voiceover, captions, and post-production polish in CapCut, Premiere, or DaVinci

Working from scripts and reference videos to produce scene-by-scene animated content

Traditional video editing work beyond AI animation (UGC cuts, static ads, etc.)



What we're looking for:



Experience with AI image generation tools (we want to hear which ones you use)

Experience with AI video/animation tools (same — tell us your go-to tools)

Strong eye for cinematic composition, lighting, and Pixar-style aesthetics

Ability to prompt effectively — you understand that the prompt is the craft

Post-production skills: stitching scenes, syncing voiceover, adding captions

Fast turnaround and clear communication



Bonus: experience creating ads or content for DTC/ecommerce brands



This is a part-time / project-based role. We'll start with a trial task to see how you work.



To apply: Please fill out the Google Form linked below. The form includes a short trial task so we can see your work in action.







Do NOT apply through OnlineJobs.ph messaging. 



Applications are only accepted through the Google Form.

title: Digital Marketing Specialist | Social Media | SEO | Ads

title: Civil Engineer
description:
JOB ADVERTISEMENT – CIVIL ENGINEER (REMOTE)



FingerHug, a company based in Bosnia and Herzegovina specializing in architectural design, technical development, construction planning, and project support, is expanding its team and is looking for an experienced Civil Engineer for a remote position.



We are looking for a highly skilled, responsible, and self-driven professional with strong practical and technical knowledge of construction, especially from an execution and contractor’s perspective. The ideal candidate should be able to contribute to the technical planning, assessment, and development of projects with a clear understanding of structures, quantities, materials, and real construction requirements.



Requirements and qualifications:

• minimum 10 years of experience in the same or similar roles 

• strong professional background in civil engineering and construction execution 

• solid knowledge of structural systems, construction methods, and building materials 

• proven experience in preparing bills of quantities, quantity take-offs, and material assessments 

• ability to accurately calculate required quantities of key construction materials, including concrete, reinforcement steel, and other structural elements 

• strong understanding of contractor-side processes, site logic, and construction planning 

• ability to read, review, and interpret technical drawings, construction details, and project documentation 

• proficiency in relevant engineering software; knowledge of AutoCAD and similar technical tools is expected 

• strong computer skills 

• active command of the English language, both written and spoken 

• strong organizational and communication skills 

• independence, responsibility, and a professional approach to work 

• ability to work both independently and as part of a team in a remote environment 



Key responsibilities:

• reviewing and analyzing technical and construction documentation 

• preparing and verifying bills of quantities and material take-offs 

• supporting the technical evaluation of structural and construction solutions 

• contributing practical construction knowledge from an execution perspective 

• collaborating with the team to ensure technically sound, realistic, and efficient project solutions 

• helping align technical planning with execution realities, project requirements, and applicable standards 

• staying up to date with current construction practices, standards, and regulations 



What we offer:

• stable employment 

• remote work 

• opportunity to work on serious and professionally driven projects 

• competitive compensation, based on experience, knowledge, and contribution 

• a professional working environment and the opportunity for long-term cooperation 



Application:

Interested candidates are invited to send their CV to: 



Please use the following subject line: Application for Civil Engineer Position (Remote)



Only shortlisted candidates will be contacted.

title: Product Sourcing Specialist (Dropshipping)
description:
BrandFi Inc. is looking for a detail-oriented Product Sourcing Specialist who can identify profitable products and reliable suppliers for our dropshipping operations.



This role requires strong research ability, supplier negotiation skills, and a deep understanding of pricing, shipping logistics, and product quality.



We are not looking for someone who simply searches AliExpress. We need someone who understands how to find high-margin products, negotiate supplier pricing, and manage shipping efficiency.



?



Role Overview



The Product Sourcing Specialist will be responsible for finding products that can be sold profitably while maintaining strong supplier relationships and reliable shipping timelines.



You will identify suppliers, compare pricing across multiple platforms, negotiate costs when possible, and ensure shipping reliability.



The goal is to maintain high margins while ensuring product quality and fulfillment reliability.



?



Key Responsibilities



Product Research & Sourcing



• Identify profitable products based on market demand and competition

• Source products from reliable suppliers

• Compare supplier pricing across multiple platforms

• Ensure product quality and supplier reliability



Supplier & Price Optimization



• Negotiate product pricing where possible

• Identify suppliers offering the best wholesale rates

• Monitor product cost changes and adjust sourcing strategy



Shipping & Fulfillment Management



• Identify suppliers with reliable shipping times

• Evaluate fulfillment options (AliExpress, CJ Dropshipping, private suppliers, etc.)

• Ensure shipping timelines meet customer expectations



Product Validation



• Evaluate product quality and supplier ratings

• Verify supplier reliability and fulfillment capability

• Check order processing times and return policies



Cost & Margin Analysis



• Ensure products maintain healthy profit margins

• Factor in product cost, shipping cost, and platform fees

• Recommend pricing strategies to maintain competitiveness



?



Daily Responsibilities



• Research and identify new product opportunities

• Compare supplier pricing and shipping options

• Build product sourcing lists with cost breakdowns

• Verify supplier reliability and fulfillment speed

• Maintain organized sourcing spreadsheets and supplier databases



?



Required Skills & Experience



• Experience with dropshipping product sourcing

• Strong supplier research skills

• Experience evaluating product margins

• Understanding of shipping logistics and fulfillment timelines

• Ability to identify reliable suppliers and avoid low-quality vendors

• Strong attention to detail



?



Preferred Experience



• Experience with Shopify stores

• Experience sourcing from AliExpress, CJ Dropshipping, or private suppliers

• Experience negotiating supplier pricing

• Understanding of product trend analysis



?



Work Style Expectations



• Highly detail-oriented

• Research-driven and analytical

• Comfortable comparing suppliers and negotiating pricing

• Process-driven and organized



?



Important Notes



• This role requires real research and supplier evaluation

• We prioritize quality suppliers and strong margins

• Candidates must be comfortable performing detailed product analysis

title: Online ESL Teacher
description:
1. Position Introduction



Salary and Benefits:

• Per hour : $2 – $4

• Trial class (first class with a student): $0.5 (regular salary applies for subsequent classes)



Bonus:



• $5 extra bonus for full attendance



• Additional bonus of $15 – $45 and paid leave for excellent teachers



Teaching Content:

Business English, daily conversation, kids’ English enlightenment, and adult oral English.



Students:

Students are mainly aged 3–18.



Teaching Mode:

One-on-one classes, 25 minutes per class.



Working Hours (China Time, UTC+8):

Part-time or full-time available. Working hours: 13:00–23:00.



• Part-time: 4 hours between 18:00–23:00 (peak teaching hours in China)

• Full-time: 8 hours per day, including 4 hours during peak hours, the remaining 4 hours can be flexibly arranged.



Difference between Part-time and Full-time:

• Part-time teachers: required to work 4 hours during the specified peak period.

• Full-time teachers: 8 hours per day, 4 hours during peak hours, the other 4 hours can be arranged flexibly.



All completed classes will be paid accordingly. We will arrange classes based on your available time, so you don’t need to worry about scheduling.



2. Position Advantages



Stable income, flexible working hours, remote work, schedule adaptable to your needs, stable student source, high booking volume, and course materials provided (no need to prepare teaching materials by yourself).

title: Credit Repair / Credit Building Specialist.
description:
Job Description



We are looking for an experienced Credit Repair Specialist to help improve credit scores by reviewing credit reports, identifying errors, disputing inaccurate items, and creating a credit-building strategy.



The ideal candidate has experience working with U.S. credit bureaus and understands how to build and repair personal credit effectively.



Responsibilities

Review credit reports (Experian, Equifax, TransUnion)

Identify negative or inaccurate items affecting credit score

Submit disputes to credit bureaus and creditors

Track dispute progress and follow up regularly

Create a credit-building plan (secured cards, credit utilization strategy, etc.)

Provide guidance on improving credit score over time

Maintain organized records of all disputes and updates

Communicate progress weekly



Requirements



Proven experience in credit repair and credit building

Strong knowledge of U.S. credit laws (FCRA, FDCPA is a plus)

Experience submitting disputes and handling bureau responses

Organized and detail-oriented

Good communication skills

Ability to work independently and meet deadlines

Preferred Skills (Bonus)

Experience with Credit Repair Cloud or similar software

Experience working with clients in the U.S.

Knowledge of business credit building

Pay



Hourly or fixed-rate (negotiable based on experience)



To Apply



Please send:



Your credit repair experience

Examples of results you’ve achieved (score improvements, dispute removals, etc.)

Tools/software you have used

Your expected hourly rate



Use the link:

title: Website Manager (WordPress / SEO / Content) - 16-24h P/W -
description:
About Brightways



We help brands grow on marketplaces like Amazon and 
.



We are not a standard agency. We act as a business partner.

Clear strategy, strong execution, real results.



Our website (brightways dot nl) should reflect that. More than it does now.



--



The role



We are looking for someone who takes ownership of our website.



Not a developer. Not a designer.

Someone who improves, builds and structures pages using our existing CMS (WordPress, custom setup).



You will:

- Build and improve pages using available content blocks

- Improve structure, clarity and navigation

- Optimize pages for SEO and conversion

- Expand the website with new pages

- Help launch and maintain the English version of the site



You work closely with our team and design team, but you are responsible for sprint planning execution.



--



Multilingual content (NL ? EN)



Our website is currently only available in Dutch.

You will help expand and maintain the English version.



This means:

- Translating and rewriting pages from Dutch to English

- Making sure the tone of voice stays consistent

- Improving content instead of translating it literally

- Using AI as a tool, not as the final result

- Aligning with our team to get the content right



--



Growth opportunity (Social)



In a later stage, there is an opportunity to expand your role.



This includes:

- Supporting in setting up and improving our social content

- Repurposing website content into social posts

- Helping structure and scale our content output



This is not the core of the role now, but it can become part of your responsibility if you perform well.



-- 



Requirements:

- Strong experience with WordPress (custom CMS or page builders)

- Solid understanding of SEO (on-page, structure, internal linking)

- Ability to structure content clearly and logically

- Experience improving websites, not just maintaining them

- Comfortable working with AI tools (ChatGPT, etc.)

- Good written English

- Able to work independently and take ownership



--



Important



This is not a developer role.

This is not a basic VA role.



We are looking for someone who thinks in structure, clarity and growth.



--



How we work:

- You are proactive and used to work in clear sprints

- You take ownership of your work

- You communicate clearly and directly

- You focus on output, not activity



--



Application task (required)



We want to understand how you think and work.



Create a short plan (max 1 page) answering:



How would you approach improving and expanding our website (
), including adding an English version?



Your plan should include:

- First steps you would take

- How you prioritize what to improve first

- How you would handle NL ? EN content

- How you would improve SEO and structure

- How you would work in sprints



Keep it practical. No generic answers.



--



What we look for



We don’t care about long resumes.



We look for:

- Clear thinking

- Ownership

- Practical execution

- Attention to detail



If your answers are generic, we won’t move forward.



--



Video requirement (mandatory)



To be considered, you must include a short video (max 2 minutes).



In this video:

- Show that you have reviewed our website (
)

- Share your first impression

- Mention 2–3 concrete things you would improve



No generic introductions. We want to see how you think.



Applications without video will not be reviewed.

title: Short-Form Video + Social Media
description:
Part-Time VA — Short-Form Video + Social Media (2 Projects)



I started two new small websites and need a part-time VA to handle weekly content creation and social media for both. This is an ongoing role, roughly 5 hours/week.



The Projects:




 — tracks public market predictions made by well-known financial commentators.


 — a free online coloring page website.



Weekly Tasks



TASK #1: ForecastCard — Prediction Reel (~2 hrs)

Create ~90 second compliations of a person's predictions and results. 

Format: vertical reel (9:16 for TikTok / Reels / Shorts).



I provide:



All source clips. Example: 



A manifest with each prediction, date made, and outcome. You can also find it in the above link.



You handle:



- Trimming the clips

- Adding captions/subtitles, outcome and score graphics, music and sound, effects.

- Posting to TikTok, Instagram, and YouTube Shorts



TASK #2: ColoringBreak — Coloring Page Video (~2 hrs)

Pick one page from 
 and create a short coloring video. The video should include both formats below, cutting between them or back to back:



Screen recording — color the page directly in the browser on the site

Paper recording — print the page and film yourself coloring it by hand (phone camera is fine, no special equipment needed).

Light edit, add background music, keep it under 60 seconds. Post to socials once per week.



TASK #3: Community Engagement (~1 hrs)

Genuine participation in relevant Reddit and
 groups (coloring, mindfulness, personal finance/investing). Be helpful first — only mention the sites when it's very natural and relevant.



Paid Trial Projects: Before hiring, I'd like to offer a paid test task covering both sites:



ForecastCard reel — Create the reel using the dropbox source clips above. $20.00 USD.



ColoringBreak reel — Pick any page from 
 and record yourself coloring it — either a screen recording directly on the site, or print it out and film yourself coloring it by hand. Light edit, add background music, keep it under 60 seconds. $20.00 USD.



What I'm Looking For:



- Comfortable with basic video editing

- Experience posting to Instagram, TikTok, YouTube Shorts

- Strong written and spoken English



Details



- Rate: $12/hr depending on experience 

- Hours: ~5 hrs/week, ongoing

- Schedule: Flexible — just needs to be posted once per week per task



To apply: Share some creative work. Examples of short-form video content would be great but anything that shows your creativity will be considered.

 and LinkedIn

, LinkedIn, etc.)

title: STRUCTURAL ENGINEER / STATICIAN
description:
JOB ADVERTISEMENT – STRUCTURAL ENGINEER / STATICIAN (REMOTE)



FingerHug, a company based in Bosnia and Herzegovina specializing in architectural design, technical development, structural planning, and project support, is expanding its team and is looking for an experienced Structural Engineer / Statician for a remote position.



We are looking for a highly skilled, responsible, and self-driven professional with strong expertise in structural design, analysis, and evaluation, who can contribute to the technical development of projects with precision, reliability, and a deep understanding of structural safety and construction logic.



Requirements and qualifications:

• minimum 10 years of experience in the same or similar roles 

• strong professional background in structural engineering and static analysis 

• proven experience in the design, review, and evaluation of structural systems for residential or commercial buildings 

• solid understanding of reinforced concrete, steel, and other structural elements 

• ability to perform structural calculations and assess load-bearing systems, stability, and overall structural performance 

• experience in reviewing structural drawings, technical documentation, and execution-related details 

• strong understanding of construction methods, structural behavior, and applicable engineering standards 

• ability to identify practical, safe, and efficient structural solutions 

• proficiency in relevant engineering and technical software; knowledge of AutoCAD and structural analysis tools is expected 

• strong computer skills 

• active command of the English language, both written and spoken 

• strong organizational and communication skills 

• independence, responsibility, and a professional approach to work 

• ability to work both independently and as part of a team in a remote environment 



Key responsibilities:

• developing, reviewing, and evaluating structural solutions for company projects 

• performing structural calculations and verifying the safety and feasibility of proposed systems 

• reviewing technical documentation, drawings, and structural details 

• contributing to the optimization of structural concepts in line with safety, functionality, and execution requirements 

• collaborating with the team to ensure technically sound and realistic project solutions 

• helping align structural planning with project requirements, standards, and construction realities 

• staying up to date with current engineering standards, regulations, and best practices in structural design 



What we offer:

• stable employment 

• remote work 

• opportunity to work on serious and professionally driven projects 

• competitive compensation, based on experience, knowledge, and contribution 

• a professional working environment and the opportunity for long-term cooperation 



Application:

Interested candidates are invited to send their CV to: 



Please use the following subject line: Application for Structural Engineer / Statician Position (Remote)



Only shortlisted candidates will be contacted.

title: VA- Client Support and Operations
description:
I am looking for a thoughtful, detail-oriented Virtual Assistant to support my somatic wellness business.



My work is centered on helping people reconnect with themselves, their well-being, and their inner sense of strength and wholeness. I am also deeply passionate about women reconnecting with their power and supporting one another.



This is a role where both care and precision matter. The work behind the scenes directly shapes how well-supported my clients feel.

I am looking for someone who is kind, steady, and attentive — and who also genuinely enjoys problem-solving and creating well-functioning systems.



Visual creativity or social media experience would be a bonus! 



Main Responsibilities:



Client Support



Respond to client
s with a warm, friendly, and grounded tone

Take care of scheduling and rescheduling clients, and general administrative requests

Help clients feel cared for, while also keeping communication clear and efficient

Hold clear boundaries with a respectful and steady presence



Scheduling + Calendar Management



Manage appointments inside Acuity (multiple calendars, complex scheduling)

Track availability, resolve conflicts, and ensure accuracy across calendars

Bring a calm, organized approach to moving pieces and changing schedules

Class + Program Setup (High Attention to Detail)

Create and manage group classes in Acuity

Update Squarespace web pages with current class information 

Set up and maintain class schedules with precise dates and details

Build and manage complex notification
s within Acuity

Ensure all client-facing information feels clear, consistent, and easy to follow



Systems + SOPs



Create, maintain, and update SOPs for all administrative procedures

Use and refine existing templates for common client questions

Gently improve systems over time so things feel smoother, clearer, and more efficient



Platforms



Primary platforms:

Google Workspace

Squarespace

Acuity Scheduling

Familiarity with these is strongly preferred.

Additional platforms (helpful but not required):

Canva

Instagram


YouTube



Communication + Collaboration



Provide more communication with me, rather than less

Keep me updated when tasks are completed or in progress

Ask questions when something is unclear rather than guessing

Meet with me on Zoom every couple of weeks for check-ins

Help establish a simple, supportive communication system during training

 (Slack,
, shared notes, or similar)



Additional + Future Responsibilities



This role may grow over time, depending on your strengths and interests:

SEO support on website (renaming images, writing alt text, etc)

Organizing and maintaining my testimonials bank

Updating Client Support page and key website links

Managing links to classes and current playlists

Drafting and scheduling newsletter
s

Researching tools and platforms to help build simple, effective workflows

Light bookkeeping (FreshBooks, organizing expenses, flagging deductions)

Organizing Google Drive files and systems

Preparing, uploading, and scheduling social media content (using platforms such as Instagram,
, YouTube, and Canva)

Planning blog content and repurposing existing content



Who This Role Is For



You are someone who:



Communicates with warmth, steadiness, and emotional intelligence

Has a strong attention to detail and takes quiet pride in accuracy

Naturally double-checks your work and notices small inconsistencies

Enjoys bringing order and clarity to systems and information

Follows through reliably and communicates along the way

Is comfortable learning and working across multiple platforms

Prefers thoughtful, well-paced work over rushed output

Feels aligned with the wellness and personal growth space



This is a collaborative role in a values-driven business centered on nervous system health, embodiment, and sustainable well-being.



I am building something intentional and long-term — a space where people can come home to themselves.

Care in communication and integrity in work are key in this role.

Flexible schedule, remote (communication during North America time zone is important)



On this job posting, I listed the desired number of hours to be 15. However, I am not sure of the exact amount of hours. It might be less than 15 to start. My budget is about $
right now. I would love to find a VA to stay with me for many years. They would likely take on a bigger role, and thus have more hours and higher pay as time goes on. 



FYI: It is very helpful to me to see the results of your English language, IQ, and DISC tests. Candidates with these scores will be considered higher priority. 



APPLY HERE:

title: B2B Partnership Sales — Recruiting Call Centers & Media Buyers (Remote)
description:
I run a US-based call buying operation. Companies and individuals send me qualified phone calls. I pay them per call. Simple.

My system is built. My buyers are ready. The only thing missing is someone who goes out every day and finds the people who produce the calls — then convinces them to send those calls to me.

This is a sales job. You are not calling consumers. You are not generating leads. You are selling a business partnership to call center owners, media buyers, and telemarketers.

Your pitch is simple: "You already produce debt settlement calls. I'll pay you more than you're getting now. Here's a tracking number. Send your calls here. You get paid weekly."

What you do every day: Find call producers on industry forums,
 groups, freelance platforms, and LinkedIn. Message them. Pitch the offer. Handle objections. Close the deal. Onboard them. Then find the next one. Repeat.

This is not a VA role. This is not admin work. This is not data entry. If you are a closer who has pitched business deals, recruited vendors, or built partnerships — this is your job.

What makes you a fit:

— You have pitched businesses on working WITH you, not buying FROM you

— You can send 20+ cold messages a day without burning out

— You can handle rejection and keep going

— You have experience in outbound B2B sales, recruitment, vendor sourcing, or affiliate/performance marketing

— You can write a message that makes a busy person respond

What you get:

— $2,500/month base for 20 hours/week

— $50 bonus for every new partner you bring on who produces approved calls

— A long-term role that scales as the business grows into new verticals

— Simple, clear work with one goal: fill the pipeline with call partners

To apply, do this one thing: Go to 
 or 
 right now. Search for someone who is advertising that they produce debt settlement calls or warm transfers. Send me their profile link and the exact message you would send them to pitch my offer. If you can't find one or won't try, this isn't the right role for you.

Wage/Salary: $2,500/month + $50 bonus per partner onboarded

Desired No. of Hours Per Week: 20

Business or Contact Name: Ben Horch

Skills: Outbound Sales, Telemarketing, Lead Generation

distribution.

Research & Planning

Track competitor channels and note high-performing video topics



Script Writing

visuals

finishing.

title: Growth & Sales Specialist — Financial Intelligence Platform (Commission-Heavy)
description:
I run The Capitol Dossier — a financial intelligence platform that tracks smart money movements (congressional trades, insider filings, hedge fund positions, lobbying, federal contracts). It's a $97/month subscription product with a $1,497/year premium tier. The product is live and functional. I need someone who can generate paying subscribers.

This is NOT a VA role. This is NOT content creation. This is NOT customer support. This is a sales and partnership development role.



YOUR JOB:



Identify and reach out to paid trading community owners on Whop and 
 to set up revenue-share integrations where our intelligence feed plugs into their existing community. Whop handles the payment splitting automatically.

Identify and pitch finance newsletter operators (on Beehiiv, Substack, Ghost) to insert our intelligence content into their existing paid newsletters as a premium section or cross-recommendation.

List our product on affiliate networks (JVZoo, WarriorPlus, Stakecut, ClickBank) and manage incoming affiliate relationships.

Recruit micro-influencers on X 
) and StockTwits in the finance/trading space to promote as affiliates with recurring commission.

Run outreach campaigns via
 to trading community owners pitching partnership deals.

Track all outreach, conversions, and partner relationships in a shared spreadsheet.



YOU ARE A GOOD FIT IF:



You have experience selling digital subscriptions, SaaS products, info products, or online courses

You understand affiliate marketing, revenue sharing, and partnership structures

You've used platforms like Whop, Gumroad, ClickBank, JVZoo, or similar

You can write professional outreach messages in fluent English

You are comfortable being judged on results, not hours worked

You've generated paying customers for someone else's product before



SHOW ME IN YOUR APPLICATION:



Specific examples of products you've sold or partnerships you've closed

How many customers/subscribers/sales you generated and over what timeframe

What channels you used 
 outreach, social media, affiliate networks, community partnerships)

Why you think you can sell a $97/month financial intelligence product



Do NOT apply if you are a general VA looking for task work. I need someone who knows how to generate revenue.



COMPENSATION:



$500/month base salary + 20% recurring commission on every subscriber you bring in. Commission is tracked via unique referral links and paid monthly.



Example math: If you bring in 50 subscribers in your first month, that's $970/month in recurring commission + $500 base = $1,470/month. Those subscribers keep paying, so your commission grows every month even if you do nothing new.



30-day trial period. If you haven't generated at least 5 paying subscribers in 30 days, we part ways. If you're producing, this becomes a long-term role with uncapped earning potential.



WAGE/SALARY:



$500/month + commission

DESIRED NO. OF HOURS PER WEEK: 20

BUSINESS OR CONTACT NAME: The Capitol Dossier

title: Amazon Data Analyst - Day Shift, Remote, FT (PH)
description:
About RocketAMS

RocketAMS is a thriving, fully remote Amazon eCommerce agency based in Australia, founded by ex-Amazon Australia employees with over $100 million in collective sales experience. We're a startup on the rise, aiming to redefine success on Amazon for our clients. Join a dynamic team that values expertise, collaboration, and growth.



Role Overview

We are seeking a detail-oriented Amazon Data Analyst to support internal teams by delivering accurate, timely, and actionable insights from Amazon and eCommerce data. This is a behind-the-scenes, non-client-facing role, focused on data analysis, reporting, and automation to enable informed decision-making across the business.



Responsibilities:

Data Analysis:

Collect, process, and analyze Amazon sales data, advertising data, and relevant marketplace metrics.  

Build, maintain, and optimize dashboards and reports related to sales performance, inventory levels, and advertising efficiency.  

Identify trends, patterns, and anomalies in datasets to support internal planning and strategy.  Use SQL and/or Amazon Marketing Cloud (AMC) to query, analyze, and validate large datasets.  Automate recurring reports and data workflows using Google Sheets, advanced formulas, or BI tools. 



Internal Team Support:

Work closely with Brand Managers, Account Specialists, and PPC teams to support strategy and execution through data insights.  

Provide clear, structured analysis to help internal teams optimize listings, advertising performance, and operational planning.  

Ensure data accuracy, consistency, and reliability across internal reports and dashboards.



Requirements

2+ years of data analytics experience 

Hands-on experience with Amazon Marketing Cloud (AMC) or SQL 

Experience with Amazon, advertising, or eCommerce data

Strong analytical skills with advanced Google Sheets / Excel capability

Experience with reporting, forecasting, and performance analysis

High-detail-oriented, organized, and able to manage tasks independently



Benefits

Paid Time Off

Work From Home

Training & Development

Private Health Insurance After 12 Months

Day Shift - 7am to 4pm PH Time

title: Social media manager with the right feeling
description:
Finding the right social media manager is difficult.

Someone who will use all our knowledge and experience of our program and our target audience and combine them with their experience and talent.



Plenty of people respond to my ads, but it’s hard to find that one right person. That person with the right skills, the right insights, and the right feeling for what we do.



Social media is a complex discipline. You learn this by understanding the specific market and target audience, by working with results and numbers, and by analyzing what worked and what didn’t. To start all over again tomorrow, because the algorithms have changed.



A feeling for what we are doing is important. Also talent in authentic writing, talent to make visuals that stand out, a good feeling for the different platforms, the ability to see what to post, when and where, and to monitor the results of your posts. This is where a certain talent comes in.



We are looking for a social media manager who fits this description.

The position is for 15-20 hours a week, including some tasks on weekends.

You can work from home and mostly plan your own working hours.



About us:

Arcticterns.global is a non profit foundation that creates gatherings for traveling families to build community they often miss because of their lifestyle. We host month long programs in different countries, where families come together, connect, learn, and grow. Community is at the heart of everything we do.



Interested?

- Please send a cover letter in which you explain why you are interested and the skills that make you a strong fit for this role. Please make sure your authentic writing skills show in the cover letter and do not use AI.

- Please include samples of your work that touch the above description

- Please include your salary range for the 20 hour/week job

title: Social media manager
description:
Finding the right social media manager is difficult.

Someone who does things the same way I would do them, with all my knowledge and experience of our program and our target audience internalized… but better. Of course that someone does not exist (yet!).



Plenty of people respond to my ads, but it’s hard to find that one right person. That person with the right skills, the right insights, and the right feeling for what we do.



Social media is a complex discipline. You do not learn this from a course, some online tips, or from experience in a previous position. You learn this by understanding the specific market and target audience, by working with results and numbers, and by analyzing what worked and what didn’t. To start all over again tomorrow, because the algorithms have changed.



A feeling for what we are doing is important. Also talent in authentic writing, good visual awareness, the ability to see what to post, when and where, and to monitor the results of your posts. This is where a certain talent comes in.



We are looking for a social media manager who fits this description.

The position is for 20 hours a week, including some tasks on weekends.

You can work from home and mostly plan your own working hours.

Payment is 15000 PHP/month, based on 20 hours/week.



About us:

Arcticterns.global is a non profit foundation that creates gatherings for traveling families to build community they often miss because of their lifestyle. We host month long programs in different countries, where families come together, connect, learn, and grow. Community is at the heart of everything we do.



Interested?

- Please send a cover letter in which you explain why you are interested and the skills that make you a strong fit for this role. Please make sure your authentic writing skills show in the cover letter and do not use AI.

- Please complete the IQ test and the DISC test this platform offers.

title: Short-Form Video Editor for Instagram Reels (UGC / Skincare Content)
description:
I’m looking for a creative and reliable video editor to help grow my Instagram page in the skincare niche and assist with developing AI avatar content in the future.



The main focus right now is creating engaging Instagram reels. The AI avatar work will be a secondary project once the Instagram content workflow is established.



This role is best suited for someone who specializes in editing short-form social media content (Instagram Reels / TikTok style videos) and understands pacing, hooks, and viewer retention.



Important: Please only apply if you have experience editing Instagram Reels or TikTok style short form videos. Applications without relevant reel examples will not be considered.



Responsibilities



Instagram Reels Editing

• Edit short form Instagram reels using raw clips provided  

• Create strong hooks within the first 2–3 seconds  

• Use a clean, aesthetic editing style  

• Add minimal text captions to communicate the message  

• Maintain smooth pacing to keep viewers engaged  

• Deliver Instagram-ready videos with a fast turnaround  



Content Direction



• Help structure content that is suitable for UGC-style content, PR opportunities, and brand collaborations  

• Ensure content looks clean, professional, and brand-friendly  

• Maintain a consistent visual aesthetic for the page  



Social Media Support



• Assist with preparing and posting daily Instagram reels  

• Engage with other content creators and relevant accounts  

• Reach out to skincare brands for potential PR and collaboration opportunities  

• Help support the growth and visibility of the page  



Content Style



The content should feel:

• Light and interesting  

• Visually clean and aesthetic  

• Engaging and easy to watch  

• Not overly clinical or lecture-style  



AI Avatar Content (Future Project)



• Assist with creating AI avatar style content  

• Use tools such as HeyGen, Midjourney, Runway, or similar  

• Help produce AI generated videos that align with the brand style  



Required Tools



Applicants must already have access to their own editing tools and software.



Examples include:

• CapCut Pro  

• Adobe Premiere Pro  

• After Effects  

• Canva  

• AI tools such as Midjourney, Runway, HeyGen, etc.



Please do not apply if you do not already have access to the tools required to complete the work.



Trial Period



We will begin with a short trial period of up to 14 days to determine if we are a good fit for a long-term working relationship.



Trial payment will be provided once the agreed trial deliverables are completed.



Compensation



This role will begin at approximately $150–$200 per month for around 12 hours per week.



Compensation may increase over time as the workflow grows and responsibilities expand.



Requirements



• Experience editing short form content for Instagram or TikTok  

• Understanding of hooks and viewer retention  

• Ability to follow creative direction  

• Good communication and reliability  

• Ability to deliver edits with a quick turnaround  



Communication



We will communicate through
 for updates and feedback.



Application Instructions



To confirm you have read this job post carefully, please begin your application with the word “Glow”.



Also include the following in your application:



1. Links to 2–3 Instagram Reels or short-form videos you have personally edited  

2. The editing tools you currently use  

3. One strong hook idea for a skincare reel  

4. Briefly explain how you would structure a 15 second skincare reel to keep viewers watching until the end



Applicants who include links to Instagram Reels they have edited will be prioritized.



Looking forward to working with someone creative and reliable who can help grow this brand.

title: Full-Time Graphic Designer / Ad Creative Designer
description:
We're a US-based digital agency running paid media, CRO, and web development for US e-commerce and lead-gen clients. We're expanding our design team. You'll own ad creative for specific client accounts and collaborate with our other designer on shared projects.



This is a full-time, long-term role - not a project gig. You'll be creating ad creative for Meta and Google campaigns, designing landing pages, and producing marketing assets daily. Speed and quality both matter.



What you'll do:

- Design static ad creatives for Meta 
/Instagram) and Google Display - multiple variations per concept, fast turnaround

- Design and iterate landing pages focused on conversion (not just aesthetics)

- Create social media graphics,
 headers, and marketing collateral

- Work within brand guidelines while pushing creative boundaries for performance

- Prep and organize design files in Figma for handoff

- Collaborate with our media strategist and account managers via Slack and Loom



AI-Powered Creative Production:

AI tools are a core part of how we work - not optional. We use tools like Nano Banana Pro, Adobe Firefly, and others daily. Bring your favorite AI tools and we'll support them. We expect working knowledge of at least 2-3 AI creative tools. AI is an accelerator, not a substitute for strong design fundamentals.



What we're looking for:

- 3+ years of design experience with a strong portfolio showing real ad creative (not just mockups)

- Proven experience designing Meta/Facebook/Instagram ads that actually ran

- Comfortable designing landing pages with conversion in mind (clear CTAs, mobile-first)

- Strong Figma skills (our primary design tool)

- Ability to produce multiple ad variations per day from approved concepts

- Familiar with ad format specs (1080x1080, 1080x1920, responsive display, etc.)

- Good written English for Slack/Loom communication

- Available to work with overlap during US Central hours (minimum 4 hours daily)



Nice to have:

- Experience with Shopify or e-commerce clients

- Motion design / simple video editing

- HTML/CSS basics for landing page implementation

- Experience with A/B testing creative or CRO principles



What we offer:

- $800-$1,200 USD/month depending on experience (paid via Wise on the 1st)

- Year-end bonus equivalent to one month's pay

- 15 days PTO + your local holidays observed

- Full-time, long-term position - we're building a team, not a project

- Work directly with agency leadership

- AI-forward team - we'll pay for your AI tools



All work begins on a 2-week paid trial at full rate to assess fit for both sides.



TO APPLY:

1. Link to your portfolio showing real ad creative that ran on Meta or Google

2. What kinds of ads have you designed? For what industries? What formats?

3. What design tools and AI tools do you use daily?

4. Your timezone and daily availability for US Central overlap

5. Your preferred monthly rate in USD



BONUS: Record a 2-3 minute Loom walking through 2-3 ads you designed. Applicants who include a Loom get a response within 48 hours.

This is NOT a basic VA role.

Applications that do not follow these instructions will NOT be reviewed.

Communicate with venues 
 and occasional phone calls)

 Management:

Organize inbox daily

Respond to routine
s professionally

Flag important messages



General Administrative Support:

Assist with operational tasks as needed

Support team communication and coordination



Who We’re Looking For:

Extremely detail-oriented

Highly organized

Proactive and reliable

Strong communicator in English

Comfortable working with U.S.-based businesses

Able to follow instructions AND think independently



Required Skills:

Excellent written and spoken English

Experience with Google Docs, Sheets, and Calendar

Strong organization and time management

Ability to handle multiple tasks and deadlines



Compensation:

Competitive pay based on experience

Long-term opportunity

Growth potential and performance bonuses



APPLICATION TEST TASK (REQUIRED)

Do NOT apply unless you complete this task.



TASK OVERVIEW:

You will simulate part of your actual role—researching and organizing a dinner workshop venue.



STEP 1: Venue Research

-Find 3 high-quality restaurants in:

-Scottsdale, Arizona (USA)

Have a private dining room or event space

STEP 2: Organize the Information

-Name

 you would send to the restaurant to inquire about booking a private dinner event.

STEP 4: Attention to Detail Check

-At the very bottom of your submission, include this exact sentence:

-“I am detail-oriented and followed all instructions.”



SUBMISSION INSTRUCTIONS:

-Submit your test task with your application

-Include everything in ONE message (no separate links unless necessary)

-Put this in your subject line:

"VA Test Task – [Your Name]"



Final Note

-We are looking for someone who can take ownership, not just follow instructions.

-If you are organized, proactive, and take pride in your work—this role can grow quickly for you.

title: Social Media Manager
description:
This is not a basic social media manager role. I do not want someone whose skill set is just posting graphics, writing captions, scheduling content, and calling it strategy. I need someone who genuinely understands how to create content that gets attention, builds a brand, and drives engagement.



This person should feel much closer to a content creator / strategist than a traditional SMM.



Our entire marketing plan is built around organic content that feels real, differentiated, and memorable. We are not trying to look like a typical apparel or branding company. No generic posts, no safe content. Everything should feel intentional and attention-grabbing.



When reviewing portfolios, I need to see:



Strong short-form video (TikTok / Reels)

Content that feels native to the platform, not corporate or overly polished

Clear hooks in the first 1–3 seconds

Personality, humor, and storytelling — not generic content

Proof of performance (views, engagement, growth, etc.)

Real brand work, not just sample or filler content



If it’s mostly Canva graphics, generic captions, or no performance data, it’s not a fit.



On creativity — I’m looking for someone who knows how to make people stop scrolling. Someone who can take a simple idea and turn it into something entertaining or memorable. They should think in content series, not just one-off posts, and have strong instincts for humor, timing, and pacing.



Now most important — INDUSTRY BACKGROUND:



I do not want corporate or traditional marketing backgrounds.



I want candidates who have worked in or closely with:

- Apparel / streetwear / lifestyle brands

- E-commerce brands (especially DTC)

- Content-heavy brands (TikTok-first or Instagram-first brands)

- Agencies that focused on social-first brands, not corporate clients

- Personal brands / creators with strong followings



Big plus if they’ve worked with:

- Brands targeting younger demographics (18–35)

- Edgy, humorous, or personality-driven brands

- Fast-moving content environments where volume and speed matter



I do NOT want backgrounds in:

- Real estate marketing

- Corporate B2B content

- Medical, law, or overly professional industries

- Anything that feels slow, safe, or overly polished



Those backgrounds almost always produce content that feels boring and outdated.



The right person should understand internet culture, trends, and how modern brands actually win attention. They should already “get it” without needing to be taught from scratch.



I care a lot about taste. I want someone whose work clearly stands out and feels current, sharp, and intentional.



I would rather pass on candidates than lower the standard. 





If you have the required skill set, send me a DM on WhatsApp at 
. Please do not apply if you don’t meet the key requirements.

title: Japanese Bilingual Senior Clinical Quality Specialist / Auditor (Pharmaceutical)
description:
Job Title: Japanese Bilingual Senior Clinical Quality Specialist / Auditor (Pharmaceutical)

 Salary: 150,000-170,000 PHP  

Willingness to travel internationally from time to time.



Role Overview

As a  Japanese Bilingual Senior Clinical Quality Specialist / Auditor  , you will play a critical role in delivering high-impact quality consulting and compliance support to life sciences clients. You will lead quality system assessments, gap analyses, audits, remediation planning, and cross-functional compliance projects. You will work directly with senior leadership and clients to ensure alignment with global regulations, GxP standards, and industry best practices.

Key Responsibilities

Lead assessments of quality systems and operational processes against GxP requirements (GCP, GMP, GLP, GDP) and global regulations



Support development, implementation, and remediation of Quality Management Systems (QMS)



Conduct and lead internal and external quality audits, clinical site audits, vendor audits, and readiness assessments



Interpret and apply regulatory requirements including:



ICH E6(R3) – Good Clinical Practice



ISO 14155 – Clinical Investigation Standard



21 CFR Part 312 (IND Requirements)



21 CFR Part 812 (IDE Requirements)



21 CFR Part 211 (Pharmaceutical GMP)



21 CFR Part 820 (Medical Device QMS)



Collaborate with cross-functional teams to develop corrective and preventive actions (CAPAs), remediation plans, and quality improvement initiatives



Prepare high-quality deliverables including audit reports, gap analysis summaries, compliance strategy documents, and training content



Guide clients in regulatory inspection preparedness and mock inspection scenarios



Provide education and training on quality system requirements, regulatory expectations, and industry standards



Serve as a subject-matter expert (SME) for regulatory interpretation and complex compliance challenges



Required Qualifications

Bachelor’s degree in Life Sciences, Engineering, Quality Assurance, Regulatory Affairs, or related field



Fluent in written and spoken Japanese



Minimum 7–10+ years of quality assurance experience in clinical or pharmaceutical/medical device environments



Proven experience with clinical quality systems and compliance (ICH, GCP, etc.)



Strong working knowledge of:



? ICH E6(R3) and GCP principles



? ISO 14155 clinical investigation standard



? FDA regulations: 21 CFR 312, 812, 211, 820



? Global regulations and quality system standards (e.g., ICH E10, Q9, EMA, China, Korea, Japan, EU MDR, IVDR, ISO 13485)



Experience conducting and leading quality audits and assessments



Quality / Auditor certification such as:



ASQ Certified Quality Auditor (CQA) or equivalent



Certified Quality Engineer (CQE), Certified Manager of Quality/Organizational Excellence (CMQ/OE) preferred



Demonstrated ability to lead cross-functional initiatives and mentor junior staff



Strong communication, presentation, and technical writing skills



Preferred Attributes

Prior consulting experience in life sciences (clinical trials, medical devices, biologics, pharma)



Experience working with regulatory agencies or participating in regulatory inspections



Familiarity with electronic QMS and audit management tools
