title: Local SEO Strategist | SEO Manager | Remote
description:
About the Role

This is not an entry-level position and not a generic "SEO specialist" role. You will own the strategy and results for local SEO campaigns targeting competitive metro markets across the US.



You will manage a small team of specialists -- content writers, link builders, and citation builders -- and be directly responsible for the quality of their output. Your job is to make sure every client's local presence grows measurably, month over month.



The agency works exclusively with home services businesses. Multi-location Google Business Profile expansion, local pack dominance, and organic lead generation are the core of what they do. If you have deep experience in local SEO for home services or multi-location businesses, this is built for you.



What You Will Do



Strategy and Execution



Develop and execute local SEO strategies for 8-12 home services clients across competitive US metro markets

Conduct keyword research focused on local intent, service-area targeting, and multi-location expansion

Build and manage Google Business Profile optimization strategies across multiple locations per client

Plan and oversee content strategies that target local search intent and support topical authority

Identify and prioritize quick wins (positions 4-15 keywords, content gaps, technical issues with revenue impact)

Conduct competitive analysis at the local level -- geogrid rankings, local pack composition, citation gaps



Team Management



Manage and QA the work of 3-5 specialists: content writers, link builders, and citation builders

Create detailed content briefs with target keywords, search intent analysis, internal linking plans, and word count targets

Review all deliverables against quality standards before they go to clients

Provide specific, actionable feedback that improves output quality over time

Maintain SOPs for repeatable processes and update them as best practices evolve

Reporting and Communication

Deliver monthly performance reports per client with clear narratives connecting actions to results

Track and report on KPIs: local pack rankings, organic traffic, GBP impressions/actions, citation accuracy, link acquisition

Flag underperforming clients early with diagnosis and corrective action plans

Communicate async via project management tools. Weekly written updates, monthly video check-ins.



Compensation and Terms



Type: Independent contractor, month-to-month engagement

Hours: Part-time, approximately 20-30 hours/week

Location: Remote.

Growth: Performance bonuses tied to client ranking improvements and portfolio growth. Opportunity to take on more clients and increase compensation as the team scales.

No long-term contracts. We start with a paid trial period (3-4 weeks) with defined deliverables and clear success criteria. If it works, we keep going. If it does not, we part ways cleanly.



Requirements



Must Have



3+ years of hands-on local SEO experience -- not general SEO with some local work mixed in. Local SEO must be the core of your practice.

Multi-location GBP management experience -- you have managed and optimized Google Business Profiles across 5+ locations for a single business or agency portfolio

Demonstrated ranking results -- you can show keyword ranking improvements, local pack gains, or organic traffic growth with specific numbers. We will ask for Google Search Console access to verify.

Content strategy skills -- you can write a content brief that a writer can execute without guessing what you want

Link building knowledge -- you understand what makes a quality backlink, can evaluate link prospects, and know the difference between a $50 link and a $500 link

Citation and NAP management -- you have built and cleaned up citation profiles and understand the local search ecosystem (data aggregators, directories, industry-specific platforms)

Team management experience -- you have directed the work of at least 2-3 other people (writers, VAs, link builders) and improved their output quality

Strong written English -- reports, briefs, and client-facing communication must be clear and professional

Available during US business hours for at least 4 hours of overlap (Eastern or Central preferred)



Technical Proficiency



Google Search Console and Google Analytics 4

Google Business Profile management (including multi-location)

Ahrefs or SEMrush (at a working level, not just pulling reports)

Local rank tracking tools (BrightLocal, Local Falcon, or equivalent)

Citation management tools (BrightLocal, Whitespark, or equivalent)

Screaming Frog or similar crawl tools for technical audits

Comfortable working in project management tools (ClickUp, Asana, or similar)



Nice to Have



Experience with home services verticals (HVAC, plumbing, landscaping, etc.)

GBP suspension recovery and reinstatement experience

Knowledge of review generation strategies and reputation management

Experience with Google LSAs (Local Services Ads) and local PPC

Familiarity with schema markup implementation for local business

Experience creating and maintaining SEO SOPs for a team

Spanish language proficiency (useful for some client markets)



About Nexta Talent



Nexta Talent is a specialized recruiting firm that connects top international talent with growing US-based businesses. We are currently hiring on behalf of a digital marketing agency client based in the United States that specializes in local SEO and lead generation for home services businesses.



Our client manages a portfolio of home services companies across competitive US metro markets. They are looking for a senior Local SEO Strategist to join their team as a long-term contractor and take ownership of local SEO execution across their client portfolio.



HOW TO APPLY:



We use a structured screening process to ensure the best fit. To be considered, submit your application with a short cover letter and screening responses at www. applynexta.online

title: GoHIghLevel CRM Manager Needed
description:
**GoHighLevel (GHL) CRM Setup & Data Migration**



We're a full-service
 and SMS retention marketing agency with 50+ active clients across DTC and e-commerce. We've never had a centralized CRM — all our data lives across Calendly, Stripe, Square, and Slack. We need someone experienced with GoHighLevel to build it out from scratch.



**Scope of Work**



Set up GoHighLevel as our central CRM, import all historical data, and build out pipelines and segments we can run automations against.



**What we have ready:**



- 771 Calendly bookings (dating back to Jan 2022)

- 82 Stripe customers + 354 invoices (USD)

- 184 Square customers + 925 invoices (CAD)

- CSV exports from all platforms, ready to hand off



**What we need built:**



- Full CRM pipeline with proper deal stages

- All historical data imported and backdated accurately

- Calendly integration (live, ongoing)

- Stripe integration (live, ongoing)

- Contact segments for active clients (~50), churned clients (~163), and unconverted leads (~411)

- Automations-ready tagging and structure so we can layer in workflows post-setup



**Ideal candidate:**



- Proven experience setting up GoHighLevel from scratch

- Strong with data migration, deduplication, and CSV imports

- Familiar with Calendly and Stripe integrations inside GHL

- Detail-oriented — backdating and data accuracy matter

- Bonus: experience working with agencies or high-volume service businesses



**To apply, include:**



1. Examples of past GHL setups or migrations you've completed

2. Your estimated timeline for this scope

3. Your rate (fixed project price preferred)



We'll send over all CSV exports as soon as you're selected. This is a project-based engagement with potential for ongoing GHL management.

title: Growth & Operations Virtual Assistant (Chiropractic / Wellness)
description:
Who We Are

Sacred Flow Chiropractic & Wellness is a nervous-system-focused practice in Washington, USA. We blend gentle chiropractic, nervous system care, and a calm, grounded environment so patients can regulate, heal, and stay well.



We’re now ready for a VA who loves the mix of marketing, systems, and patient support—and wants to help build something that grows over time.



What This Role Is Really About

This role exists to:

Keep patients and leads moving through the practice (not falling through the cracks)

Make marketing and follow-up consistent instead of “whenever there’s time”

Keep the back end organized so the practice can grow without chaos



If you enjoy organizing information, following through on details, and creating simple, effective marketing, you’ll likely enjoy this work.



Key Responsibilities

1. Patient & Lead Flow

Help keep active patients scheduled out 1–2 months

Follow up with past patients and warm leads by
/text

Support patients with intake forms and payment updates

Keep simple lists of “who needs what next” so no one is missed



2. Marketing & Content Implementation

Create and schedule ~5 social media posts per week (graphics + captions)

Use Canva to design clean, on-brand graphics

Support reels and short-form content (basic edits, posting, ideas)

Use AI tools to draft content, then adjust tone to match Sacred Flow

Over time, assist with simple funnels, nurture sequences, and basic ads



3. Outreach & Events

Maintain a simple list of local businesses and partners

Help with outreach for workshops, community events, and dinners

Support event logistics (reminders, simple graphics, print files, etc.)



4. Organization & Admin Support

Help organize patient data in an EHR (Jane or similar is a plus)

Keep weekly financial/booking notes organized for easier bookkeeping

Coordinate print jobs (sending files for printing/pickup)

Work from a shared task list and update progress consistently



Tools & Skills

You’re a good fit if you:

Are comfortable with Canva and Google Workspace (Docs, Sheets, Drive, Gmail)

Have experience creating social media content (posts, basic reels)

Are comfortable using AI (ChatGPT or similar) to draft and improve copy

Communicate clearly in English, in writing and on video

Like working from a list, staying organized, and closing loops



Bonus points if you have:

Used GoHighLevel or another CRM/funnel platform

Worked with healthcare, wellness, or holistic brands

Experience with podcast repurposing or simple audio/video support

Experience in outreach, partnerships, or nonprofit/community work



What It’s Like to Work Together

You’ll have a clear list of priorities, with room to ask questions and suggest improvements.

Most work is async, as long as tasks are done within agreed timeframes (usually within 24-72 hours for normal tasks).

As you help create more structure and results, there will be room for more hours, higher pay, and more ownership.



How to Apply 

This version is slightly different from the first posting so we can see different strengths. Please follow these steps:

Start your message with: GROWTH

Share 3–6 examples of your work (social media, graphics, funnels,
s, or outreach messages). For each, add 1–2 lines about what you did.



Answer these three questions briefly:

a) In your own words, what do you think is most important when following up with past patients or leads for a wellness practice?

b) What is your process for turning a rough idea (for example: “workshop about stress and the nervous system”) into actual posts and graphics on a calendar?

c) What tools from this list have you used: Canva, Google Workspace, GoHighLevel (or similar CRM), any EHR? Describe your experience level with each.

title: ???? CUSTOMER SERVICE AGENT — BrickArsenal (Tactical Foam Blaster Brand)
description:
???? Remote | ? Full-Time or Part-Time | ???? $4.00–$4.50/hr | Weekly Pay via Wise/PayPal



WHO WE ARE



BrickArsenal is a US-based e-commerce brand selling tactical foam blasters inspired by Call of Duty and Warzone aesthetics. We build gear that looks and feels like the real thing — minus the danger — so that dads and their kids can actually play together. Think weekend backyard ops, birthday missions, and family game nights with a military edge.



We're a lean, fast-moving brand with real customers who love what we sell. Our team is remote, our systems are tight, and we take customer experience seriously. Every ticket that gets handled well is a family that comes back.



THE ROLE



You'll be our front line. Customers reach out with questions about orders, shipping, returns, product info, and occasional complaints. Your job is to answer clearly, solve what you can, and only escalate when it genuinely requires it.



This is an
-based role handled through Freshdesk. No phone calls. No live chat required.



What you'll handle day-to-day:

- Order status and tracking inquiries

- Return and exchange requests

- Missing or damaged item claims

- General product questions

- Relaying accurate info to customers without overcomplicating things



WHAT WE'RE LOOKING FOR



We don't need someone who follows scripts robotically. We need someone who actually cares about the customer on the other end — and knows when to solve it themselves vs. when to pass it up.



You're a great fit if you:

- Have at least 1 year of experience in e-commerce customer service (Shopify brands preferred)

- Have used a helpdesk tool like Freshdesk, Gorgias, Zendesk, or similar

- Write in clear, friendly, professional English — no fluff, no robotic tone

- Take ownership of tickets without waiting to be hand-held

- Are reliable, on-time, and communicate proactively if something comes up

- Respect the customer even when they're being difficult

- Align with our values: family-first, honest, solution-oriented, no drama



COMPENSATION & LOGISTICS



- $4.00–$4.50/hr based on experience

- Weekly payouts via Wise or PayPal

- Fully remote, work from home

- SOPs and training materials provided — you won't be thrown in cold

- Major opportunity to be promoted to team lead or manager (we're a growing brand)



?? HOW TO APPLY — READ CAREFULLY



Applications without a video introduction will not be reviewed. No exceptions.



Please submit:

1. A short video (2–3 minutes) introducing yourself, describing your CS experience, and answering this question: "Tell me about a time you resolved a difficult customer situation without escalating it. What did you do?"

2. Your resume or work history

3. Any tools or helpdesks you've used



Upload your video to Google Drive, Loom, or YouTube (unlisted) and include the link in your application.



We're looking for someone who takes this seriously. If you made it this far and you're the right person — we want to hear from you.

title: Cleaning Company Virtual Assistant
description:
Cleaning Company Virtual Assistant (Sales, Dispatch and Operations)

Work From Home | U.S.-Based Cleaning Company



We are hiring immediately and looking to fill this position within the next few days.



Type of Work: Full Time

Salary: $750/month (Base + Bonus)

Hours Per Week: 40



---



Job Overview



We are a growing U.S.-based cleaning company looking for a reliable, organized, and proactive Virtual Assistant from the Philippines to manage daily operations, handle inbound leads, follow up with past customers, and help us grow.



This is not just a basic VA role. You will be responsible for booking jobs, keeping the schedule full, and helping generate new business.



If you are fast, professional, and comfortable with sales and communication, we would love to work with you.



---



What You’ll Do



Inbound Lead Handling



* Answer inbound calls, texts, and messages

* Handle leads from Google Guarantee (LSA), Google Search, Google Maps,
 Ads, and Thumbtack

* Respond quickly during business hours

* Convert leads into booked jobs



Scheduling and Dispatch



* Schedule cleaning appointments and manage the calendar

* Dispatch cleaning crews and confirm job details

* Send confirmations and reminders

* Handle reschedules and customer support



Recurring Customer Growth



* Follow up with past customers to rebook services

* Turn one-time customers into recurring clients (weekly, bi-weekly, monthly)

* Help keep the schedule full



Outbound Sales



* Call local businesses, offices, and property managers to offer cleaning services

* Reach out to potential clients for commercial cleaning

* Track outreach and follow up



Admin and Payments



* Send estimates and job details

* Collect and process payments

* Keep CRM updated and organized



Hiring Support



* Help interview and onboard cleaners

* Assist with hiring additional VAs if needed



---



What You Need



* Experience with cleaning companies or home service businesses

* Experience handling leads from Google,
, or Thumbtack

* Comfortable with phone calls and sales

* Experience with cold calling is a plus

* Strong English communication skills

* Experience with scheduling, dispatching, and CRM systems

* Organized, reliable, and able to multitask



---



Tools and Software (Preferred)



* BookingKoala

* GoHighLevel

* OpenPhone or similar phone system

*
 Meta Business Suite



---



Tech Requirements



* Reliable internet (10 Mbps minimum)

* Noise-canceling headset

* Webcam for Zoo
etings

* Quiet workspace

* Dual screens preferred



---



Compensation and Schedule



* $500/month base pay

* $250/month performance bonus

* Total: $750/month

* Salary increases based on performance and time with the company

* Holiday Time Off, Holiday Bonuses & Quarterly Bonuses 

* Paid Time Off available after probation period



Schedule:

Monday to Friday, 9:00 AM to 6:00 PM CST

Includes a 1-hour lunch break and two 15-minute breaks



---



Performance Bonus Requirements



To earn the $250 bonus, you must:



* Respond to new leads within 2 minutes during your shift

* Maintain at least a 70% booking rate

* Maintain a 90% show rate

* Follow up with all unbooked leads for at least 3 days

* Help convert customers into recurring services

* Collect payment the same day when possible

* Maintain good communication and attendance



---



Probation Period



There is a 30-day probation period. Performance, attendance, and communication will be evaluated. PTO and long-term eligibility begin after successful completion.



---



How to Apply



Send your application to: 



Subject Line: Cleaning VA Application - Your First and Last Name



Include:



1. Your resume

2. A 2-minute Loom video introducing yourself



   * Your experience with cleaning or home service companies

   * Your experience handling inbound and outbound calls

   * How you book jobs and communicate with customers

   * Any hiring or interview experience

3. Any examples of your work (if available)



---



Important



* Applications without a Loom video will not be considered

* You will not be scheduled for an interview without a Loom video

* Use the exact subject line or your application will not be reviewed

* This role requires fast response times

* No call, no show will result in removal



---



Apply today. We are hiring quickly.

title: E-commerce & Content Operations Assistant
description:
# E-commerce & Content Operations Assistant 



## About Us



We are a fast-growing beauty brand based in Sydney, Australia, focused on skincare, education, and curated product recommendations. We create content-driven experiences across Instagram,
, and our website to help customers achieve better skin.



---



## Role Overview



We are looking for a **mid-level Creative Content Assistant (Video Editing & Design Focus)** who can execute high-quality visual content efficiently across digital channels.



This is a **remote, part-time role (15 hours per week)** aligned with Australian Eastern Standard Time (AEST).



This role is **primarily creative-driven**, with a strong focus on short-form video editing and graphic content creation. You should be comfortable producing visually appealing, on-brand content quickly and consistently.



We are looking for someone who already has hands-on experience creating content for e-commerce or beauty brands and can work independently without needing step-by-step guidance.



---



## Key Responsibilities



* Edit high-quality short-form video content for Instagram (Reels) using tools such as CapCut or InShot

* Create visually engaging Instagram Stories, Carousels, and
 Campaign designs using Canva

* Design creative assets aligned with brand guidelines and marketing campaigns

* Upload and format products on the website (images, descriptions, layout)

* Set up and design visually engaging
 campaigns (content will be provided)

* Provide customer service support across Meta (Instagram and
 messages and comments) and

* Maintain strong visual consistency and brand alignment across all outputs



---



## Required Experience



* Minimum 2 years of relevant experience in e-commerce, content creation, or a similar role

* Previous experience creating content for e-commerce or beauty brands

* Strong video editing skills for short-form content (Reels / TikTok style) using tools such as CapCut or InShot

* Strong design skills using Canva (layout, typography, visual balance)

* Experience with Shopify or similar platforms (product uploads, formatting)

* Experience using Meta scheduling tools for content publishing

* Ability to follow and apply brand guidelines consistently

* Good written English for customer communication



---



## What We’re Looking For



* Strong creative eye and ability to produce visually appealing content

* Able to complete creative tasks efficiently without excessive time

* Comfortable working independently and making basic creative decisions

* Reliable, responsive, and consistent

* Able to manage workload and meet deadlines

* High attention to detail

* Strong communication skills and ability to provide daily updates

* Familiarity with tools such as Trello and Slack for task management and communication



---



## Important (Please Read)



This is an **execution-focused role**.



We are looking for someone who has already performed similar tasks multiple times and can work efficiently from the start.



If you are still learning or require extensive guidance for basic tasks, this role may not be the right fit.



---



## Working Hours



* 10–15 hours per week

* Monday to Friday

* Must have overlap with AEST business hours



---



## Application Instructions



To apply, please begin your application with:

**Content Operator**



Then include:



* A link to your portfolio (content, product uploads, or similar work)

* Confirmation you can work during AEST business hours

* Answers to the following:



  1. How long does it typically take you to edit a 20-second video using provided clips?

  2. How long does it take you to upload 1 product to a website (including formatting)?



Applications without complete answers will not be reviewed.



## Typical Weekly Tasks



* Edit 2 short-form videos (Reels)

* Create 5 Instagram Stories

* Design 1 Instagram Carousel

* Design and set up 2
 campaigns

* Upload 5-10 products to the website

* Produce other graphics as needed, e.g. website banner, promotional materials

* Provide customer service support (Meta messages/comments and
)



---



Shortlisted candidates will complete a **paid test task**.



---



## Notes



We value speed, reliability, and clear communication.



The goal of this role is to support execution and reduce workload, not to require ongoing training.

title: Remote Estate Planning Paralegal (International Attorney) – Systems-Driven, Detail-Obsessed A-Player
description:
About Us

We are an established and fast-growing U.S.-based law firm built on a simple principle: A-players + systems = exceptional results



We don’t tolerate mediocrity, hand-holding, or chaos. Our firm runs on clear processes, accountability, and high performance—and we’re looking for someone who thrives in that environment.



The Role

We are hiring a highly detail-oriented foreign attorney to manage the backend of our estate planning process from draft to final execution.



This is NOT a “figure it out as you go” role.



You will:

- Help establish and then execute established SOPs

- Follow structured workflows

- Ensure every client receives a flawless experience



What You’ll Do



Drafting & Case Management

- Draft estate planning documents based on:

  - Intake forms

  - Established templates

  - Defined procedures

- Manage each case from draft to execution to completion



Client Coordination

- Ensure every client is scheduled for their estate plan review

- Coordinate:

  - Signing appointments  

  - Notary  

  - Witnesses  



Execution & Quality Control

You are the final line of defense.



- Confirm documents are executed perfectly

- Ensure:

  - All signatures are correct  

  - Notarization is complete  

  - Witness requirements are met  



Post-Signing Process

- Ensure deeds are properly recorded  

- Ensure a custom client binder is ordered

- Confirm completed plans are returned to clients  

- Trigger review requests from satisfied clients  



Who You Are



Non-Negotiables:

- Completed formal legal education 

- Extreme attention to detail (you catch what others miss)

- Able to follow SOPs exactly without cutting corners

- Highly organized and process-driven

- Strong written and verbal English



You Thrive If You:

- Love checklists, systems, and structure

- Take ownership of outcomes (not just tasks)

- Get satisfaction from doing things right the first time

- Don’t need constant supervision



This Is NOT for You If:

- You “wing it” instead of following systems

- You miss details or make frequent errors

- You need constant direction or reminders

- You’re looking for a low-responsibility role



Compensation

We believe in paying for performance.



This is a well-compensated role based on:

- Experience

- Skill level

- Proven ability to execute at a high level



Top performers will be rewarded and have opportunities to grow within the firm.



Why This Role Matters

In our firm, this role is critical.



You are responsible for:

- Delivering a 5-star client experience

- Ensuring zero errors in execution

- Helping the firm scale through process excellence



How to Apply



To be considered, follow these steps exactly:



1. Submit your resume

2. Include a short video (2–3 minutes) answering:

   - Why you are a good fit for this role  

   - Your experience with document drafting and SOPs  

3. In your application, include the phrase: “Details matter.”



Applications that do not follow these instructions will not be considered.



Final Note

We are not looking for average.



We are looking for someone who takes pride in precision, ownership, and excellence—and wants to be part of a firm that is growing fast and doing things the right way.



If that’s you, apply now!

title: Senior Full-Stack Product Integration Engineer - Trading Platform + Gateway + Chart + Voice
description:
We’re building Wealthy, a modern trading product that combines a frontend app, chart system, backend gateway, and AI voice layer into one customer-ready experience.



This is not a generic CRUD app role.



We need a strong engineer who can work across the integration layer and help turn an already-built foundation into a more stable, customer-ready product.



What you’ll work on



You’ll help stabilize and integrate:



Frontend app built with React/Vite

Chart layer and chart embedding/integration

Backend/gateway built with Node/TypeScript

Realtime / stateful system behavior across auth, session, connection, and data flow

Voice service integration using a prepared Python/FastAPI voice prototype

Current stack

React / Vite / TypeScript

Node.js / Express / TypeScript

WebSocket / realtime data flow

Chart-heavy product UI

Python / FastAPI

Redis

Docker

What we need from this hire



The first contract is focused on making the first customer-ready product slice feel cohesive and reliable.



In scope

Stabilize frontend + chart integration

Improve app state truth across auth / connection / feed status

Harden the canonical backend/gateway

Improve diagnostics, reliability, and maintainability

Wrap the working voice prototype into a production-ready service

Help make frontend, charts, gateway, and voice work together cleanly

Out of scope for the first engagement

Full integration of 31 expert/agent modules

OMS / live order routing / execution stack

Major repo restructuring or renaming

Big visual redesign

You are a strong fit if you have

Must-have

Strong TypeScript experience

Strong Node.js / Express backend experience

Solid React / Vite frontend experience

Experience with stateful systems and debugging auth/session/data-flow issues

Experience with WebSockets or realtime systems

Ability to productionize Python / FastAPI services

Ability to work inside an existing codebase without trying to rewrite everything

Nice-to-have

Trading platform or market-data experience

Chart-heavy UI experience

Redis + Docker experience

FastAPI inference/TTS service experience

Experience with gateway/backend systems that sit between UI and external providers

Rithmic or exchange/API integration exposure

Voice scope



We already have a working voice prototype.

We are not looking for a voice-model researcher.



We are looking for someone who can:



wrap the voice system into a production-ready FastAPI service

add Docker, health checks, logging, and Redis caching

support endpoints like:

/tts/generate

/tts/stream

/health

/voices

/tts/batch

integrate the voice service cleanly into the existing product stack

What success looks like



A strong first engagement would result in:



cleaner frontend/chart/gateway integration

more reliable backend/gateway behavior

clearer state truth and diagnostics

production-ready voice service wrapping

a tighter, more customer-ready product experience

How we work



We care about:



clean thinking

practical debugging

stable implementation

low-ego communication

working with the current architecture instead of blowing it up



We do not want someone who immediately wants to rewrite the whole stack.



To apply, send:

A short intro about your background

Your most relevant experience for this role

Examples of similar work:

frontend/backend integration

realtime systems

chart-heavy apps

FastAPI services

TTS or inference-service integration

Your hourly rate or preferred pricing

Your weekly availability

How you would approach a first contract like this

Any questions you’d want answered before starting

Bonus points



Include a short note on:



how you debug confusing state issues across frontend and backend

how you would approach integrating a prepared voice service into an existing product.  Tell me about a product where you had to stabilize both frontend and backend integration, not just build one side.

Have you worked with WebSockets, realtime feeds, or stateful session systems?

Have you worked on chart-heavy products or trading/financial apps?

Have you productionized a Python/FastAPI service before?

How do you handle joining an existing codebase with mixed legacy and active modules?

What would be your first step when debugging a system where the frontend says one thing and the backend/data source says another?

Are you comfortable working on a product that includes React/Vite, Node/TypeScript, charts, and voice-service integration?

title: QA Tester (Mobile App) — CAIT Connect (Remote)
description:
About CAIT Connect

CAIT Connect is a next-generation GenAI platform built for families — designed to help parents manage daily life, caregiving, medical needs, and everything in between. Think: ChatGPT, but built specifically for family life — with memory, shared caregiving, tracking, and real-time support. We are preparing for launch and looking for a detail-oriented QA Tester to help ensure a seamless, high-quality experience for thousands of families.



Role Overview

You’ll be responsible for identifying bugs, validating features, and ensuring the CAIT app works reliably across different real-life use cases. This is not just technical QA — we are looking for someone who can think like a parent/user and catch issues that impact real-world experience.



Responsibilities

Test new features across iOS (and future Android) builds

Identify, document, and track bugs using Jira

Reproduce issues and clearly describe steps, expected vs. actual behavior

Perform regression testing before releases

Validate key flows:

- onboarding

- shared caregiving

- daily logs / summaries

- calendar sync

- photo & video uploads

Test edge cases (time zones, delays, sync issues, etc.)

Collaborate with product and engineering teams for quick bug resolution

Provide feedback on UX issues, not just technical bugs



Requirements

Experience as a QA Tester for mobile apps (iOS required)

Strong familiarity with Jira (bug tracking, tickets, workflows)

Ability to write clear, structured bug reports

title: Sales Manager — Outbound B2B Team Lead | US Financial Services
description:
LOCATION: Remote — Work from home anywhere in the Philippines

HOURS: 40 hours/week | Must overlap with US Eastern Time (9AM–6PM EST)

SALARY: $1,400 USD/month + commision

START: Within 3-5 days of hire

GROWTH: Performance bonuses after 90 days + raise review at 6 months + opportunity to build and lead an entire sales department



PLEASE READ THIS ENTIRE POST BEFORE APPLYING. Mass applications without the required items at the bottom will be ignored.



ABOUT US

Commera is a US-based financial services brokerage that connects small business owners with working capital funding. We are NOT a call center — we are a growing company building our founding team. You will not be employee #500. You will be employee #1 in the Philippines.

We work with funding partners across the US and help business owners access $5,000 to $500,000 in revenue-based financing within 24-48 hours. Our merchants are restaurant owners, trucking companies, contractors, retailers, and healthcare providers who need fast capital to grow.

This is a ground-floor opportunity. You will not follow someone else's playbook — you will BUILD the playbook. If you want a job where you clock in and follow a script someone else wrote, this is not for you. If you want to build a sales engine from scratch and eventually lead a team of 5-10 people, keep reading.



THE ROLE

You are the first sales hire in the Philippines. Your job is to:



Build our outbound sales operation from scratch. Create the cold calling scripts, objection handling guides, lead qualification criteria, and daily KPI tracking system. You own this.

Make outbound calls to US small business owners.
dials per day during US business hours. You will speak with restaurant owners in Texas, trucking companies in Florida, retailers in California. You need to be confident, professional, and persuasive on the phone with American business owners.

Qualify merchants and collect applications. When a business owner is interested, you walk them through our simple application: business name, monthly revenue, time in business, funding amount needed. You collect 3 months of bank statements and submit the deal package to our funding partners.

Manage the deal pipeline. Track every lead, call, follow-up, and submission in our CRM. Report daily numbers: calls made, contacts reached, applications collected, deals submitted, deals funded.

Train and manage future tea
mbers. As we grow (target: 3-5 additional SDR agents within 3-6 months), you will recruit, train, and manage the calling team. You will conduct daily huddles, listen to recorded calls, coach agents on objection handling, and hold the team accountable to targets.

Coordinate with the US-based founders. Daily Slack updates. Weekly 30-minute video calls. You flag problems early. You suggest improvements. You think like a business partner, not just an employee.





WHAT YOU WILL NOT DO



You will NOT do data entry, admin work, social media, or general VA tasks

You will NOT read from a robotic script — you will have talking points but need to sound natural

You will NOT work for multiple clients — this is a dedicated, exclusive, full-time role





REQUIREMENTS (Must-Have)



5+ years of outbound B2B cold calling experience — BPO, call center, or direct sales. You have made thousands of calls to business owners, not consumers.

2+ years managing or leading a sales team — You have coached agents, run daily huddles, tracked KPIs, and held people accountable.

Excellent spoken English — Neutral accent preferred. You must be able to have a natural conversation with a US business owner without sounding scripted. You will be asked to do a live cold call test during the interview.

Strong written English — Clear, professional communication over Slack and
. No grammar issues.

Experience with dialers and CRM systems — PhoneBurner, Mojo, HubSpot, Salesforce, GoHighLevel, or similar. You know how to run a dialer campaign.

Reliable internet — Minimum 25 Mbps wired connection. You have a backup internet source (mobile data or secondary ISP).

Quiet home workspace — No background noise. No roosters. No karaoke. Professional environment for US business calls.

Available for US Eastern Time hours — 9AM to 6PM EST (9PM to 6AM Manila time). Night shift is required.





NICE-TO-HAVE (Will Make You Stand Out)



Experience in financial services, lending, merchant cash advance, or business funding

Experience with appointment setting for US-based companies

Knowledge of US small business landscape (what a sole proprietor is, how credit card processing works, what monthly revenue means)

Previous experience hiring and training Filipino cold callers

Experience building outbound sales processes from zero





WHAT WE OFFER



$1,400 USD/month — paid on the 1st and 15th via Wise . That's ?85,000+/month — top-tier compensation for this role.

Performance bonuses — Starting month 4 earn $50-$100 per funded deal your pipeline produces.

Salary review at 6 months — If you hit targets, we raise your base. We want you to grow with us, not look for another job.

Real career growth — You are not joining a 500-person call center. You are building a department. Within 12 months, your title will be Head of Sales Operations, Philippines. You will hire your own team.

Long-term stability — We are building a real business, not a fly-by-night operation. We have a clear business plan. This role is not temporary.





OUR CULTURE

We are small, scrappy, and hungry. We don't do corporate BS. We do:



Radical honesty — if something isn't working, say it

Speed over perfection — launch fast, improve daily

Results over hours — I care about deals funded, not whether you took a 20-minute break





HOW TO APPLY

Do NOT click "Apply" with just your resume. I will not read generic applications.

Instead, include ALL of the following:



Your resume/CV (PDF preferred)

A 60-second voice recording introducing yourself in English. Tell me: your name, your BPO/sales experience, and why you want this specific role. Upload to Google Drive, Loom, or Vocaroo and share the link. This is required — applications without a voice recording will be skipped.

Answer these 3 questions in your application message:



How many outbound B2B calls have you made in a single day? What was the product/service?

Have you ever built a sales process or script from scratch? Describe briefly.

What CRM and dialer tools have you used? Which is your favorite and why?



Your internet speed — run a speed test at 
 and share the screenshot or result.

Your availability to start — can you begin within 5 days?



Applications with all 5 items will be reviewed within 48 hours. If shortlisted, you will be invited to a 15-minute video interview, followed by a live cold call test using our script.

I look forward to hearing from you. Let's build something great.

title: Online Math/Science Teacher(Near-Native Accent)
description:
About Pomelo Academy

Pomelo Academy is an innovative online international school dedicated to delivering high-quality education to students worldwide. We provide a dynamic and engaging learning environment, catering to individualized instruction that transcends geographical boundaries.



Job Description

We are seeking passionate and experienced Near-Native English-speaking Online K-12 Math and/or Science Teachers with verifiable teaching certifications. The ideal candidates will have strong academic backgrounds in Mathematics and/or Science, experience teaching young learners (ages 5–18), and a commitment to creating a supportive, inquiry-based, and engaging online learning environment.



Responsibilities



Deliver interactive and engaging Math and/or Science lessons to individuals and small groups of 2–6 students aged 5–18.

Teach using internationally recognized curricula such as A Closer Look, Glencoe Science, Pearson Interactive Science, NGSS-aligned resources, Singapore Math, or IB/AP/A Level Math programs.

Create age-appropriate lesson plans focused on conceptual understanding, inquiry, problem-solving, and real-world applications.

Incorporate visuals, multimedia, and hands-on virtual activities to make abstract concepts accessible and engaging.

Monitor student progress and provide timely feedback to students and parents.

Foster curiosity, discussion, and active learning in a safe and supportive space.



Qualifications

Near-native English accent with excellent spoken and written communication skills.

Strong academic background in Mathematics and/or Science (Biology, Physics, Chemistry, General Science).

Experience teaching in public/international schools or reputable online platforms.

Familiarity with inquiry-based and/or interdisciplinary approaches (e.g., STEM/STEAM).

Comfortable working between 07:00–22:00 (Weekdays) and 9:00–22:00 (Weekends), GMT+8.

Proficiency with digital platforms such as ClassIn, Microsoft Office, and other educational technologies.

Must have a stable and fast internet connection and a PC/laptop with at least Windows 10 or Mac OS Catalina.



Benefits

Opportunity to teach using globally respected Math and Science curricula.

Be part of an international, passionate team of educators.

Access to training and professional development.

Regular enrollment model (not a booking system), ensuring schedule stability and consistency

title: Founder's Associate (AI + Marketing + Operations)
description:
We’re hiring a right-hand operator to the CEO of multiple fast-growing companies across:

• Real Estate (Land Investments + Short-Term Rentals)

• Hospitality (Luxury Portfolio + Boutique Hotel Development)

• AI & Software (STR Operations Platform)

• Course



If you’re looking for a “task-based job,” this is not it.



If you want to build, scale, and operate successful companies alongside a founder, keep reading.



WHAT YOU’LL ACTUALLY DO



This role sits at the intersection of AI, marketing, and operations.



You’ll help turn ideas into execution — fast.



AI + Automation

• Build and manage workflows using tools like:

• n8n / Zapier / Make

• ChatGPT / Claude / AI agents

• Help develop internal AI systems (lead gen, CRM automation, messaging bots)

• Funnel builds (landing pages, lead flows)

•
/SMS campaigns

• Help test and iterate offers, messaging, and campaigns

• Support content systems (IG, TikTok, ads — optional but strong plus)



?



Operations + Systems

• Build SOPs, dashboards, and internal systems

• Help manage CRM pipelines

• Track KPIs across multiple businesses

• Identify inefficiencies and fix them

• pay maintenance vendors/ coordinate with bookeeping team.



?



Founder Support

• Work directly with CEO on:

•
 Management,

• Product development (AI tools / SaaS)

• Strategic decisions

• Be the person who figures things out without hand-holding

               Calendar + priority management

• Coordinating projects and follow-ups

• Research, vendor coordination, and task execution

• Acting as a second brain to the CEO



?



WHO THIS IS FOR



You are:

• Extremely resourceful (you don’t wait for instructions)

• Fast-moving and detail-oriented

• Obsessed with building systems and efficiency

• Comfortable wearing multiple hats

• Able to think like an operator, not just an executor



You likely have experience in:

• Startups, agencies, or high-growth environments

• AI tools + automation

• Marketing systems or operations



?



MUST-HAVE SKILLS

• Experience with AI tools (ChatGPT, automations, etc.)

• Strong systems thinking (SOPs, workflows, process design)

• Marketing fundamentals (funnels, lead gen, CRM)

• Excellent communication + organization

• Ability to execute quickly with minimal direction



HUGE PLUS IF YOU HAVE

• Experience with:

• Zapier / n8n / Make

• Apollo / cold outreach systems

• Real estate or short-term rentals

• Basic understanding of SaaS or product building

• Design skills (Canva, Figma)

• Social Media

• Sales

?



WHAT MAKES THIS ROLE DIFFERENT

• Direct access to CEO (no layers)

• Exposure to multiple industries

• Real ownership (you will build things, not just assist)

• Opportunity to grow into:

• Chief of Staff

• Head of Operations

• or Business Unit Lead



?



COMPENSATION

• Hourly or monthly retainer (based on experience)

• Performance bonuses tied to results

• Long-term growth potential for the right person

title: Guest Experience & Property Operations — Luxury Short-Term Rental Portfolio
description:
Lumina’s five-star guest rating is the foundation of the business.



It drives bookings, owner trust, and premium positioning. Maintaining that standard requires dedicated ownership of guest communications and property operations, especially during high-risk periods like weekends.



Until now, the CEO has managed operations across all properties. This role exists to take full ownership of day-to-day operations so leadership can focus on scaling the portfolio.





WHAT YOU’LL OWN



This is not a task-based role. You are responsible for ensuring nothing falls through the cracks across operations.



?



Guest Communications (Core Responsibility)

 • Manage guest messaging through Conduit (AI + inbox system)

 • AI handles routine messages; you handle anything requiring judgment

 • Respond quickly, clearly, and professionally

 • Resolve all open tasks — nothing sits idle

 • De-escalate issues before they become negative reviews

 • Escalate only when necessary



Your goal is to protect the five-star guest experience at all times. You will need to be proactive ability to identify problems before issues arise. 



?



Cleaning Coordination

 • Manage cleanings via Breezeway

 • Review photo reports and turnover checklists

 • Flag anything below standard immediately

 • Coordinate directly with cleaners (text/Slack)







?



Device Management

 • Monitor locks and thermostats via SweetUp

 • Act on offline devices and low battery alerts

 • Ensure everything is functional prior to guest arrival



If a lock is offline before check-in, this requires immediate escalation.



?



Vendor Coordination

 • Manage maintenance requests

 • Assess urgency and dispatch vendors

 • Confirm resolution

 • Monitor supply orders via Amazon Business

 • Maintain vendor directory in Notion



?



Owner Communications (Month 2+)



Once operational trust is established:

 • Respond to routine owner requests

 • Send weekly performance summaries

 • Provide updates on property status



Escalate anything involving contracts, pricing/fees, or relationship risk.



?



Systems & Reporting



Daily:

 • Review Guesty bookings

 • Clear Conduit inbox and task queue

 • Check SweetUp device status

 • Confirm Breezeway cleaning completions



Weekly:

 • Provide operations summary (issues, resolutions, risks)

 • Confirm calendar accuracy (no double bookings or errors)



Immediate escalation required for:

 • Guest threatening a review

 • Device offline at an active property

 • Cleaner unavailable within 48 hours



?



TOOLS YOU’LL USE

 • Conduit (guest messaging + AI)

 • Breezeway (cleaning operations)

 • Suiteop (locks and thermostats)

 • Guesty (property management system)

 • Notion (SOPs and systems)

 • Slack (internal communication)



?



COVERAGE EXPECTATION



Short-term rentals operate seven days a week, with peak activity on weekends.



Weekend availability is required. If full coverage is not possible from one person, a secondary operator may be added for support. This is a structural requirement of the business.



?



WHO THIS ROLE IS FOR



You are:

 • Extremely detail-oriented

 • Proactive and responsive

 • Calm under pressure

 • Able to manage multiple moving parts

 • A strong communicator

 • Comfortable handling guest issues independently



You think ahead, anticipate problems, and resolve them before they escalate.



?



MUST-HAVES

 • Experience in operations, hospitality, or property management

 • Strong written and verbal communication

 • Ability to manage multiple systems simultaneously

 • High accountability and reliability



?



BONUS

 • Short-term rental experience

 • Experience with Guesty, Breezeway, or similar tools

 • Spanish-speaking (for Puerto Rico coordination)



?



WHAT MAKES THIS ROLE DIFFERENT

 • Direct impact on a premium hospitality brand

 • Ownership over real operations

 • Clear path to growth into senior operations leadership



?



COMPENSATION

 • Based on experience (hourly or monthly)

 • Performance-based growth opportunities



?



HOW TO APPLY



Please include:

 1. A short introduction 

 2. Your experience with operations or hospitality

 3. How you handle urgent guest issues

 4. Your availability, including weekends



?



FINAL NOTE



This role is the backbone of the business.



If you take ownership, solve problems quickly, and maintain standards, you will become a key part of a growing luxury hospitality company.

title: AI Video Editor for Ecommerce Ads (Higgsfield, CapCut, ElevenLabs)
description:
We're a fast-growing e-commerce company creating high-converting video ads for DTC brands in supplements, footwear, and more. We're looking for an AI Video Editor who can produce incredibly realistic, AI-generated video ads that look indistinguishable from real footage.



What you'll do:

• Create 20-50 fully AI-generated video ads per week for multiple ecommerce brands

• Produce AI talking heads, UGC-style ads, and b-roll content using advanced AI tools

• Edit and assemble all video content in CapCut with expert-level precision

• Analyze competitor ads on Meta and Google to create high-converting ad variations

• Independently concept and produce creative video ad variations that drive sales

• Assist with scripting when needed (scripts typically provided)



What we're looking for:

• Proven experience creating AI-generated video ads specifically for DTC ecommerce brands

• Strong proficiency with AI video/image generation tools like Higgsfield and ElevenLabs

• Expert-level CapCut editing skills with a portfolio to prove it

• Ability to generate extremely realistic AI visuals of people, products, and environments

• Creative eye for direct-response advertising and what makes ads convert

• Self-starter who can independently produce high-volume ad creatives



Nice to have:

• Experience with Midjourney, Runway, Kling, or Sora

• Familiarity with Meta Ads Library or competitor research tools



This is a part-time position working 32 hours per week with flexible scheduling Monday through Saturday. 



How to Apply:

To make sure you've read this entire post, please start your application with the phrase 'AICreator492'. Then answer the following questions in your application:



1. Walk us through your workflow for creating a fully AI-generated UGC-style video ad from start to finish. From receiving a script to delivering the final edit in CapCut.

2. Which AI tools do you currently use for video generation, image generation, and voice generation? Rate your proficiency with each tool (beginner / intermediate / advanced).

3. How do you ensure that AI-generated talking heads and visuals look realistic enough to be used in paid ads? What techniques or tools do you use to avoid the typical "AI look"?

4. When analyzing competitor ads for inspiration, what specific elements do you look for that indicate high conversion potential?

5. How long does it take you to create a single 25-second short-form video ad that is fully AI-generated, from start to finished edit?

6. Please share your portfolio of extremely realistic AI-generated ecommerce video ads that demonstrate your ability to create converting content.

s and follow-ups

title: virtual assistant
description:
PLATFORMS & TOOLS YOU MUST KNOW

Platform

What You Need to Know

WordPress + WooCommerce


 is self-hosted on Nexcess with Elementor Pro. You’ll manage page updates, blog posts, product listings, and WooCommerce store settings. Must be comfortable editing in Elementor.

Canva

All social media graphics, promo assets, story templates, and marketing visuals. You must be able to maintain our cinematic, editorial brand aesthetic. No generic templates.


v

The Reckoning Vault is built on this platform. You need to understand the basic structure and be able to communicate updates/issues. Developer (Shohan) handles code-level changes.

Amazon KDP

Book and planner listings, keyword optimization, A+ content, category management. You’ll monitor ad campaigns and sales data.

Amazon Ads

Manage Sponsored Products campaigns. Currently running DF-AUTO-Discovery ($3/day) and HH-MANUAL-ExactMatch ($3/day). Must understand auto vs manual targeting, bid adjustments, and kill/scale criteria.

TikTok (Organic + Ads)

Post 1-2 clips daily. Manage TikTok Ads Manager — Traffic objective campaigns (NEVER Followers/Community Interaction). Understand Spark Ads setup.

Instagram / Reels

Cross-post content, engage in comments/DMs, grow followers through strategic engagement.

MailerLite


 marketing platform. Manage subscriber lists, segments, automated sequences (3
 nurture), and Rouge Reckoning branded templates. Sender: 

Payment processor for Vault subscriptions. Monitor subscriber counts and revenue. Do NOT need access to financial details — dashboard view only.

Etsy (Future)

We may expand product listings to Etsy. Knowledge of Etsy shop management, SEO, and listing optimization is a plus.

BookVault

Print-on-demand service for books and planners. Integration into 
 planned with Buy Direct buttons alongside Amazon links.

ElevenLabs

AI voice platform powering Crystal’s voice in The Reckoning Vault. You don’t need to operate it, but you need to understand what it is and how to talk about it.

CapCut

Video editing for TikTok/Reels/Shorts marketing content. Must be proficient.

YOUR SCOPE OF WORK

1. Content & Social Media Management

Build and maintain a weekly content calendar (approved by D.A. every Sunday night)

Post 1-2 TikTok/Reels clips daily using existing content library and new raw footage from D.A.

Design social graphics in Canva that match the brand aesthetic — cinematic, editorial, never generic

Write captions that sound like the brand: raw, specific, gut-punch energy. No fluff.

Engage in comments and DMs across TikTok, Instagram, and
 — build real community, not fake engagement

Repurpose long-form content (episodes, book excerpts, quotes) into bite-sized social content

Monitor trending audio and hashtags relevant to our niche (faith deconstruction, Black women’s fiction, starting over, glow-up culture)

2. Paid Advertising Support

Monitor and report on Amazon Ads campaigns (DF-AUTO-Discovery, HH-MANUAL-ExactMatch)

Set up and manage TikTok traffic campaigns ($3-5/day, Traffic objective ONLY)

Track ad spend vs. revenue weekly

Recommend kill/scale decisions based on ACOS and conversion data

Coordinate countdown deal campaigns (next window: May 2026) — align ads,
 blasts, and social pushes

3. Website & E-Commerce

Update 
 pages in Elementor Pro (product pages, blog posts, The Vault page)

Manage WooCommerce product listings and inventory

Ensure all links, CTAs, and funnels are working correctly

Help integrate BookVault Buy Direct buttons alongside Amazon links

Monitor site analytics (Jetpack stats — views, visitors, referrers, top content)

Update SEO metadata and page copy as directed

4.
 Marketing

Manage MailerLite subscriber lists and segments

Draft
 campaigns in the Rouge Reckoning voice (raw, electric, never generic — always leave them wanting more)

Monitor automated nurture sequence performance

Build new
 sequences for product launches and countdown deals

A/B test subject lines and send times

5. CRM & Organization

Maintain a task management system (Trello, Notion, or Asana — to be determined)

Track subscriber growth across Vault tiers (Free, Insider, Elite)

Tag and segment contacts in MailerLite based on behavior and purchases

Keep a running log of what’s working vs. what’s not across all channels

File management — keep shared Google Drive organized with assets, content, and reports

Prepare weekly performance summaries (sales, subscribers, engagement, ad performance)

6. Vertical Drama & Vault Promotion

Understand the vertical/short-form drama market and how The Reckoning Vault fits in it

Create promotional content specifically for the Vault — episode teasers, behind-the-scenes, subscriber testimonials

Drive traffic to 
 through organic and paid channels

Track and report on Vault subscriber growth and churn

Research competitor platforms and promotional strategies in the audio drama / vertical drama space

Think globally — this brand is not limited to the US. Marketing should consider international audiences, especially across the African diaspora and UK markets



BRAND VOICE GUIDE

This is the most important section. If you get everything else right but miss the voice, it doesn’t work.

WE ARE

WE ARE NOT

Raw, unfiltered, cinematic

Generic empowerment quotes

Editorial and specific

Church-lady inspiration

Gut-punch openers that stop the scroll

Fluffy, safe, forgettable

Real emotions from real moments

Corny motivational poster energy

Electric — always leave them wanting more

Long-winded, over-explaining

Provocative and unapologetic

Performatively edgy



Voice Examples:

GOOD: "You’ve been functioning. Not living."

GOOD: "She didn’t leave because she was strong. She left because she was tired of pretending weakness was peace."

BAD: "You are enough! Believe in yourself and shine your light!"

BAD: "Empowered women empower women! Rise queen!"

ACCESS & SECURITY RULES

You will be given limited access through shared workspaces and management tools — NOT personal logins

Canva: Team workspace access only. You will not have access to the account owner’s personal files

WordPress: Shop Manager role (not Administrator). You can manage products, pages, and content — not settings or plugins

Social Media: Access through a social management tool (Buffer, Later, or Metricool) — not direct login credentials

MailerLite: Shared login with limited permissions (no billing access)

Passwords shared via LastPass or 1Password — never via text,
, or chat

You will NEVER have access to: Stripe financial details, bank accounts, personal
, tax documents, or legal contracts

All work product created for this brand belongs to DADC SPARKS LLC

HOW WE WORK

Rhythm

Details

Sunday Night

D.A. approves weekly content calendar and drops raw content (voice memos, video clips, story ideas)

Monday–Friday

VA executes: posting, engaging, designing, reporting. D.A. is at her day job 8AM–6PM EST — do not expect real-time responses during these hours.

Daily Check-in

VA sends a 2-3 sentence end-of-day update via task management tool. What got done, what’s pending, anything urgent.

Weekly Report

Friday: VA delivers a performance summary — sales numbers, subscriber growth, engagement metrics, ad performance, and recommendations.

Communication

Task management tool (Trello/Notion/Asana) is the single source of truth. No scattered DMs or texts.

title: Construction Estimator (Drywall & Steel Stud Framing – Bluebeam Required)
description:
We are a growing construction company based in Vancouver, Canada, specializing in drywall, steel stud framing, and ceiling systems for commercial and healthcare projects.



We are looking for a reliable and detail-oriented Construction Estimator to join our team remotely.



Key Responsibilities:

 • Perform quantity takeoffs from architectural and structural drawings

 • Prepare detailed cost estimates for drywall, steel stud framing, insulation, and ceiling systems

 • Use software such as Bluebeam, PlanSwift, or On-Screen Takeoff

 • Review drawings, specifications, and addenda to identify scope requirements

 • Coordinate with our team for pricing, scope clarification, and deadlines

 • Assist with preparing quotations and bid submissions



Requirements:

 • Proven experience in construction estimating (drywall/framing preferred)

 • Strong knowledge of takeoff tools (Bluebeam is a must)

 • Ability to read and interpret construction drawings

 • High attention to detail and accuracy

 • Good English communication skills

 • Reliable internet connection and ability to work during overlap hours with Vancouver (PST)



Nice to Have:

 • Experience with North American construction projects

 • Knowledge of materials and methods for drywall and steel stud framing



Position Details:

 • Full-time, remote position

 • Long-term opportunity with consistent work

 • Competitive monthly salary (based on experience)



To apply, please include:

 1. Your experience with construction estimating

 2. Software you have used (Bluebeam, PlanSwift, etc.)

 3. Sample takeoff or project you have worked on (if available)



We are looking for someone reliable, proactive, and committed to long-term growth with our company.



“Start your application with the word ‘EstimatorPro’ so we know you have read the full job post.”

title: VIDEO EDITOR
description:
We Don't Need a Video Editor. We Need a Performance Creative Machine Who Makes Ads That Print Money.

Most video editors make pretty videos. You'll make ads that stop the scroll and scale to millions in spend.



About Rescale Media

We're not just another e-commerce company. We're a brand incubator on a mission to build enduring, value-driven brands that bring meaningful products into families' lives.

We've scaled from just drop shipping to a 30+ person team doing $1M+/month. Our goal? Multi 9-figures. And we're just getting started. Learn more at 
dia



Our Core Values:

- GENIUSES & OWNERS We partner with builders who think like founders. Not employees waiting to be told what to do—owners who see a problem and fix it.

- ITERATIONS > HOURS We don't measure success by time at your desk. We measure it by how fast you can test, learn, and improve. Ship it. Learn. Repeat.

- TRUTH OVER EGO We prioritize honesty and clarity, even when it's uncomfortable. No politics. No BS. Just data and results.



The Role

- You won't be making corporate videos or cinematic masterpieces. You'll be making ads that convert—fast-paced, scroll-stopping content that turns viewers into buyers.

- You'll work directly with our Creative Strategists who develop the concepts and hooks. Your job is to bring those concepts to life with edits that hit hard in the first second and keep people watching.

- We test a lot of creative. That means volume matters. You need to be fast without sacrificing quality—and smart enough to know which details matter and which don't.



What You'll Do

- Edit direct response video ads for Meta, TikTok, and other platforms

- Transform raw UGC footage, b-roll, and assets into high-converting ads

- Execute on creative briefs from our Creative Strategists

- Produce multiple ad variations and iterations quickly

- Add motion graphics, text overlays, captions, and sound design

- Maintain organized project files and asset libraries

- Hit deadlines consistently—we move fast

- Learn from performance data and apply insights to future edits



What We're Looking For

- 2+ years of video editing experience

- Strong proficiency in Adobe Premiere Pro or CapCut

- Portfolio of direct response or social media ads you've edited

- Understanding of what makes content work on Meta/TikTok (pacing, hooks, trends)

- Ability to work fast without sacrificing quality

- Experience with motion graphics and text animation

- Strong attention to detail—audio sync, color, pacing all matter



Bonus Points:

- Experience editing for DTC/e-commerce brands

- After Effects skills for motion graphics

- Understanding of direct response principles

- You've edited ads that actually scaled

- Experience with UGC-style content



This Role Is NOT For...

We're being direct because we respect your time:

- Editors who only know cinematic/narrative work

- Those who can't handle high volume and fast turnarounds

- Anyone who needs hand-holding on every edit

- People who take feedback personally instead of professionally

- Editors who think the algorithm is wrong when an ad doesn't perform



Compensation & Benefits

Monthly Salary: $1,000/month



Plus:

- Monthly performance bonuses tied to company Operating Profit (5-25% of salary)

- Quarterly profit pool distribution (2-7.5% of company profits shared among team)

- Remote-first environment

- Work with a team of A-players who actually give a damn

- Direct founder access—no layers of bureaucracy

- Real ownership of your domain—we don't micromanage



Our Hiring Process

We don't waste time—yours or ours. Here's how it works:

Step 1: Application (You're here!)

Step 2: Initial Interview with Founder

Step 3: Internal Assessment by Rescale

Step 4: WhatsApp update for next steps

Step 5: Signing of Independent Contractor and NDA

Step 6: Onboarding and Training

Total timeline: 1 week from application to offer.



Ready to Apply?

[ 
 ]

Complete the application form above. Be thorough—this is your first impression.



P.S. Our best-performing ads aren't the most polished—they're the ones that hook in the first second and don't let go. If you understand why a rough UGC edit can outperform a cinematic masterpiece, we should talk.



P.P.S. If you're reading this far, you're already more thorough than 90% of applicants. That's exactly who we want.

title: Reddit Assistant
description:
We’re hiring people to manage daily activity on Reddit, including posting content and interacting within communities. This is ongoing work and requires someone who actually understands how Reddit functions, not just how to scroll it.



You’ll need atleast 2+ devices (Android only). If you own multiple devices, that’s a plus and allows you to earn more. Expect roughly one hour of work per device each day.



Each day you’ll post content across several subreddits.



A critical part of this role is reading the room. The videos we provide can range from humorous to emotional to awkward or uncomfortable. You need to instantly recognize the tone and write posts that feel natural for that type of content. If you post everything the same way, you’ll fail.



You’ll also be responsible for finding appropriate subreddits for each video. That means reviewing community rules, understanding what performs well there, and making sure your post doesn’t look forced or out of place. If you can’t do that consistently, this position isn’t for you.



We’re looking for people who think independently, adapt fast, and don’t need their hand held. Prior Reddit experience is helpful but not mandatory if you learn quickly.



This is a long-term opportunity for dependable workers. Compensation is solid and can increase based on results and how many devices you use.



Earnings:

Most contributors earn $100–$500 per month, depending on consistency and the number of devices used.



Time Commitment:

Daily time commitment ranges from about 1 to 5 hours, depending on how many devices you’re using



To apply, include:

• how many devices you can work with

• your experience using Reddit

• when you’re available each day

title: Real Estate Underwriter
description:
Join Easydwell: Contribute to Innovative Homeownership Solutions



Easydwell is a rapidly expanding real estate fund dedicated to redefining access to and management of homeownership. We seek a meticulous and analytical Underwriter who excels in critical thinking, precision, and sound decision-making.



Ideal candidates possess a strong aptitude for quantitative analysis, challenge assumptions, and demonstrate a commitment to uncovering insights through comprehensive data review. If you have a disciplined underwriting approach and aspire to take ownership in a dynamic, high-growth setting, this role may be well-suited for you.



What You’ll Be Responsible For

You will be responsible for safeguarding portfolio integrity by conducting risk evaluations with accuracy, consistency, and sound judgment.

- Property Valuation & Market Analysis

Perform and interpret comparative market analyses (comps) to determine realistic property values and identify market trends.

- Risk Assessment

Review applicant financials, credit reports, and property-level data to evaluate overall risk exposure.

- Underwriting Decisions

Deliver informed recommendations to approve, decline, or counter applications in accordance with Easydwell’s established underwriting standards.

- Documentation Review & Verification

Cross-check all submitted documents to ensure accuracy, consistency, and compliance, identifying red flags or discrepancies when present.

- Clear Internal Communication

Prepare concise, professionally written reports detailing underwriting decisions and rationale for internal stakeholders.



What We’re Looking For

This position is ideal for analytical professionals who prioritize precision, accountability, and uphold high standards.

- Strong Numerical & Analytical Skills

Exceptional comfort working with financial data, identifying patterns, and drawing defensible conclusions.

- Advanced Excel Proficiency

Confident using formulas, structured models, and data organization to support underwriting decisions.

- Real Estate Valuation Experience (Preferred)

Prior experience running comps and evaluating property values in real estate or related markets is strongly preferred.

- Relevant Background

Experience in underwriting—within real estate, mortgage, or financial services—is preferred. Candidates with robust finance or analytical backgrounds and demonstrated learning agility will also be considered.

- Excellent English Communication

Clear, professional written and verbal communication is essential, including strong pronunciation for effective collaboration with global teams.
